Balloons soaring into the bright blue sky, people and Echoes rejoicing under rainbows... When the Laurel was placed upon your head, I felt so happy. This Carnevale has been spectacular in every way, and it will remain etched in my heart forever.

When I was little, I loved going to Whisperwind Haven with friends. We'd lie on slopes surrounded by flowers and watch the clouds drift by. Tilly would play their accordion, and Livia and Brenno would weave all sorts of garlands that left a wonderful scent in their wake. I still go back sometimes... in secret.
I saw shadows where light could not reach. What if the path I once believed in so fervently was never the right one? Then... No, never mind. Please don't mind me...

Something smells so good... It must be Miss Margherita's pizza cooked to perfection by Bakie... No, no, no, this month's Pizza Day already passed. What is Pizza Day you ask? It's the only day of the month we were allowed pizza at the orphanage. Even though I don't go hungry anymore, as an Acolyte I must resist gluttony.... Besides, the best pizza is one that's shared with friends.

Everything we eat comes from the good earth created by the Sentinel. According to Them, "Our bodies are vessels for our souls." Therefore, we must sustain that vessel with things that are beneficial to it, such as those found in the sacred Viscum Berry. I still have a few left, would you like to try one? The Codex says sharing makes life sweeter...

Ooof... they're still really sour...

I hope for children to be by their parent's side. For sailors to return home after long voyages. For all to soar, free as birds. For people to come together despite their differences. For the Lament to not drive people apart... Huh? What do I hope for myself? I hope... I...
This locket was a gift from my father. I always thought it had sunk with that merchant ship, but here it is again in my hands. This itself is already a miracle... I cannot ask for more.

When I was a child, I awoke on a dark shore. I walked that shore for what felt like forever until I saw a light... a few kind Acolytes of the Order brought me to a brightly lit room. They fed me, sheltered me, and treated me well. Eventually, they became my adoptive family... Sometimes when the rain lashed out at night, Livia and Brenno would cuddle up next to me until I fell asleep. With them at my side... I never felt lonely.

Mother once told me a story about an adventurer braving storms in search of freedom. When I saw Brant on stage, he reminded me of that adventurer, caring for naught while the ocean thrashes around him... Sometimes, I think Mr. Brant chooses to act out a life of equal parts comedy and tragedy.

Miss Roccia might appear ice cold, but at heart, I know she is a gentle and caring person. Her kindheartedness brings smiles to all those around her. And then there's her friend, Pero. I wonder if there's any chance Pero could also be my friend?

...I once dreamt of a black sea, with swells growing larger and more violent. Amidst the spray, the Blessed Maiden appeared—or at least I think it was her. Something in that swaying silhouette resembled her, yet it also felt so unlike her...

Not everyone in Ragunna worships the Sentinel. Certain Acolytes of the Order believe a person's worth is solely measured by their piety... But Miss Zani is brave and dependable, which just might be enough to overcome existing prejudices. After all, she's such a reliable and respectable person.

Happy Birthday! Ooh... confetti! Just like how Mama and Papa used to celebrate. Here, take this, a bluebird set with aquamarine gemstones. A little something to be by your side through winds and storms. Like this statue, may your eyes always be bright, and may luck always be with you. Your path is not one ordained by the Sentinel, but one of your own making. And no matter where you go, I will always pray for you.
May Thy love endure forever, never ceasing.
Hm... Eh? Oh, there you are! Who's a good boy...
I'm Phoebe, an Acolyte of the Order. Praise the Sentinel. May They guide you to compassion and enlightenment.
I resolve disputes in the Sentinel's name.
May the Sentinel guide those who are lost.
The sparkling sea knows no bounds.
Do I have what it takes to fight the forces of darkness?
Your light has shown me a world I had never seen.
Thanks to you, my light will shine upon those in need.
Held aloft by the rapids, I saw a golden glow... Your wisdom and grace have become gospel which I shall forever hold dear.
What significance will you grant them?
Will the approaching sounds be... beautiful enough?
This is far from the finale...

No need to rush off, the show isn't over just yet. The late hours of Tricktown belong to the revelry of bonfires, and the second act will begin at the stroke of midnight. Raise your arms, dance with abandon, and let us unveil the wild side of this city together. Free yourself through conducting, and let the notes forever carry the fervent, uninhibited essence of this night. But be careful, I might throw the baton your way at any moment.

I know full well that the differences in that piece won't go unnoticed. The inspiration for such improvisation is a gift from the city of Peyero. The sound of the city's chiming fountain was pure and clear, with a hint of warmth. When it first reached my ears, it felt somewhat familiar. As I conducted, I couldn't help but think... it was like meeting an old friend I hadn't seen in a long time. Would you like to experience it? Consider it a unique epilogue to this performance.

Would you care to know why the musical structure of this performance intrigues me so? The massive Ferris wheel I saw to the west side of Skob. Two cabins, locked in a perfect chase, forever parallel, much like a perfect fugue. They are bound to cross paths again, perhaps yearning to draw closer, yet forever unable to touch... How about joining in and becoming a part of this silent piece?

The winds of Dolores are more brisk than I imagined. Their bite mirrors the audience's stoic silence, both filled with tension. From the conductor's podium, I can almost hear the wind whispering. It's as if I've stepped outside myself. I stand there, letting the wind scatter my hair. It blows away thoughts I shouldn't have... and maybe even me. Hmm, maybe that concert hall owner was right, and I've gone a bit mad.

I've said it all now... Don't overthink it. These words have been waiting to be spoken for a long time. I've rehearsed countless ways of saying them, but truth be told, they've long since outlived their usefulness. As for why I'm revealing them now... Keeping them locked away forever would be too great of a loss. To believe them or not, is up to you.

I control the phrasing and dynamic balance through the rise and fall of my hands, shaping the notes into the sounds I desire. Through waves of pain and pleasure, I drive the orchestra toward its climax, where no one falls behind and none can escape. Until... until the symphony in my heart finds its perfect form.
After enough failures, the sting fades, and with it, the burden of worry.
The taste of redcurrants... the only thing that has left an impression on me. Its sour and bitter taste, perhaps? I find it quite tolerable actually. Maybe I've simply grown used to it...
After meat is smoked or roasted, its taste is similar to... Never mind.
I wish to comprehend the cycle of life by experiencing it over and over again.

Hecate has always stood at the crossroads of the other world, waiting, as if knowing that our paths would inevitably meet. The day I finally saw it clearly, I learned its name and understood the boundaries and choices it embodied. It stood there, silently, as if to say, "This is the moment to decide." Only when I placed my hand in its palm did I realize—Hecate is me. The me of the other world, the me of this world, and the me who moves freely between them... From that moment on, "I" became the guardian of the boundary, perceiving all, seeing even the farthest reaches of both worlds.

Overclocking is already common practice for the Fractsidus. I've seen countless people walk toward it, seize control, and exploit it. Of course, they are fully aware of the dangers it brings, death included. Don't disagree just yet. If you look at it from another angle, you'll see it offers not just a hopeless path to death, but a chance for a different kind of rebirth. After all, humans are creatures who seek safety, threatened by fear, clinging to life at all costs. But we... we should master not only living, but living even after death.
A singular existence. A living purpose. A point of reference... Heh, given all this, isn't it comforting to openly acknowledge that he and I are both using each other for our own ends?

Attempting to awaken true free will in mankind, one that dares to confront the very truths of this world is an intriguing pursuit. Pity that blind will, without the anchor of survival, becomes naught but a flash in the pan. Are not the uncontrollable turns and imperfect endings caught within the cracks of the script the very tolling of a warning bell?

Madmen who don't play by the rules lack elegance. With but a breath, they undo even the most meticulous of plans. I care not for his true desires, only that he remain as far from me as fate will allow.

Not human, yet possessing a will whole as any mortal's. A creation molded by Divinity... how I envy her. If only I could unearth the universal truth behind her success, then perhaps the echoes from the other shore would sing even sweeter.
Your birthday? Today, you say? Oh. …Well, if you're expecting a present or some kind wishes, then simply wait here. A long wait can be considered a gift in itself.

Do not fear the Fractsidus Overseer. Settle your mind. Quiet the clamor of thought. Only then can you stay and truly appreciate the perfect melody echoing through the Lycoris sea... and the true paradise that is soon to arrive.
Come, let us finish this performance we've all been waiting for. Together.
See? I haven't lost my touch.
The warm yet bittersweet first movement is hidden in the dark night, alone and forlorn. Now, those haunting, ghostly cries have begun to fade away.
The shadowed, sorrowful second movement conceals unease and terror. Are you not afraid? It will raise its dagger with force, tearing through the veil between life and death.
The bright and lively third movement carries the whimsical air of fantasy. Even suspended above falsehood and unease, it compels the notes to keep dancing forward.
The decisive and powerful fourth movement brings forth a rousing battle hymn. Carried by the rapids, it surges across an endless land, sweeping all before it.
This is... the final flourish. You've given it an unexpected change... Since that's the case, why not sit and listen as I play the full composition to its end? Do you have time now?
No, Pero. That's not for you.

All the world's a stage.
PERO: Pero! Hmph!

The world is our stage.
PERO: Pero! Hmph!

Time for some crowd work.
PERO: Pero! Rawrrr!
I'm always on the go, collecting treasures, helping my friends, making costumes, and repairing stage props... It's a busy routine, but seeing everyone smiling makes it all worth it.

Pero's box is more than just a treasure trove. It's my private lounge as well. It's bigger than you might think, and I've stashed all my nifty gadgets inside. Would you like a tour? Knock, knock—open up, Pero.
Apparently, the mix of my over-the-top gestures and stoic face is hilarious to people. See? Just like that. Oh, did I actually get a chuckle out of you? Guess I'll keep this style going, then.

Our troupe never lets anyone feel left out. We accept everyone, chasing away their worries and inviting them to be a part of the performance. If you ever feel down or sad, come see us. I'd really like to see you smile.
People say family is about helping and comforting each other. I feel safe and warm around you... So, maybe you count as family after all?

I like turning the things I collect into stage props. They might not look fancy at first, but each one has its own special story. On stage, the ordinary becomes extraordinary, and I think that's worth something.

Cleaning up the ship is always a headache. There's algae, sewage spills, and torn canvas everywhere... And of course, there's always that person who conveniently disappears when it's time to pitch in. Pft, not like a good living and performance space is important or anything. You agree, right?
Spaghetti Bolognese is great on its own, but it's even better when shared. Maybe... it's the company that makes it taste better?
Every time I see the mess those drunkards leave behind... Ugh, I just want to dump all the booze into the ocean.

One day, the streets of Ragunna will be alive with the spirit of freedom. Until then, I want it to grow within our troupe. We'll make the sad smile, help the hopeless dream again, give courage to the fearful, and remind everyone of who we really are.

Pero is my best friend. She's amazing. She can detect special frequencies on objects, carry all my stuff, and even absorb good and bad feelings and inspirations. But don't worry, she won't gobble up anything harmful, dangerous, or anything that belongs to someone.

Luceanite pebbles, if not collected in time, will lose their glow and turn to dust. I used to be one of those lost pebbles, until the Troupe of Fools came along and saved me. Now, I can help other lost souls with my own little light.

Brant is the greatest captain in all of Solaris. At least, that's what he insists I say. But it's true, having him around really does bring out the best in us. His passion is infectious, and his belief in freedom is like the mast that keeps us all steady.

Leading a large family is like steering a massive ship. It requires immense effort to keep it on course. I have firsthand experience in managing a vessel, and I admire her energy and bravery in navigating this journey.
Zani is the definition of a proper adult. Working with her is so easy, so comfortable, and I never have to worry about anything going wrong...
She's from the Order of the Deep. I don't know her very well, but… she was the first Acolyte to touch the box without getting bitten by Pero.

There's a new show in the works, a little something we've been rehearsing. Come check it out if you have the time. Spoiler alert... It's kind of important you're there for the show to work. Why? Because you're the main character! Happy birthday!

Hello, name's Roccia. Besides being the Troupe of Fools' first mate, I am also a stage mechanic and an improv performer. If you ever stumble upon something interesting, I'm a really good listener. Pero stores all that inspiration, and I'll spin it into a new improv act.
All the world's a stage, and we are mere players.
Pero's tummy is rumbling. Inspiration, don't be shy!
Tornado makers, dimension-warping lamps... I've got all kinds of props if you're interested.
Pero said she's feeling good. Get ready for her happy dance!
Pero said she's feeling like she can take out a hundred foes with one punch!
Pero said she likes you even more now. Seems her strength and confidence are growing fast.
Pero said she finally has the power to protect everyone she cares about.

Pero said she's grateful for how far she's come, thanks to you... Ahem. Sorry, scratch that. Pero never actually said any of that. It's all me, Roccia. Those are the things I've been wanting to tell you.
This is a testament to my connection with the world around me, and it's very much my companion now, bearing witness to everything I've experienced on this journey.
It is natural to feel dreadful of the unknown, yet... there are times when the unknown harbors hope, like how I can never know what else this power has to offer.
We still have a long journey ahead of us. Let's press on.
I will be there for everyone... As we head toward our shared future, leaving the past behind.
The world around me... I can hear it clearer now.
This power... it's mysterious, yet reassuring nonetheless.
I still need more time to acquaint myself with this unfamiliar world.
A new journey awaits? Brimming with novel sounds, stories, and... fragmented memories.
The place where the land ends is where the ocean begins. Our journey is far from ending.
珍惜好旅途中每一份收获。
它是我与这世界的连结，见证我所经历的一切。
路途还很遥远，继续前进吧。
我想留在大家身边……从过去，一同迈向明天。
世界……似乎变得更加清晰。
这股力量虽有些不可思议，却让我感到十分的安心。
その力使わせてもらう！
旅のだいごみ...それは道の出会い。
旅をともにをしてきたこれが、世界との ・繋がりを証明してくる。
見つけに行こう。まだ見ぬ世界へ。
皆と一緒に居たい...これからも。
世界が...より鮮明に聞こえた。
不思議な力...だけど何故か、親近感 がある。

My luck seems better with you around.
Found something you like? Keep them as you will.
Karma has caught up to me...

...Ah, apologies, I got sidetracked. My eyes... They see the original frequencies of all living beings. To me, every life appears blurry and chaotic, in the shape of their souls... I knew you were special the moment I laid eyes on you. Other than my lady Jinhsi, you are the only person who looks so clear and true. I just... I haven't gotten used to the sight of you.

We are all caught in an invisible wheel of karma. We live, we die, and we live again. As time passes, some are bound to leave us behind, having reached their journey's end. All we can do is keep them in our memories and continue forward, until our end comes... What is driving you forward on your journey, Rover?

What will I do if I can no longer stay with my lady? Should the day come, either I will have perished, or she will have accomplished her goals, and my service is no longer required. When the hour truly arrives, perhaps I will choose to live like you—as a roving traveler. It should be nice to join you on your journey.

Hmm? What am I thinking about, you ask? I'm wondering what is on your mind at the moment, Rover… I cannot tell your thoughts by observing your frequencies, because you look the way you are to me. Surprisingly... it feels good to not know what you're thinking.

There is karma in everything we do. The karma you plant at this moment will surely blossom and bear fruit sometime in the future… And for me? I am of course no exception. I believe it is no coincidence that we find ourselves here, together at this very moment.

Reciting the Heart Sutra brings calmness and enlightenment. Occasionally I would recite it for my lady Jinhsi, but she always started to grow sleepy after a while... You want to hear me recite the Sutra, too? But... you're not going to fall asleep as well, are you?

You're feeling cold? It's not that easy to keep my power in check- especially when I'm unable to suppress my emotions. Though it doesn't bring much harm, the coldness sometimes inevitably causes trouble for others. Do you not mind? Or... would you prefer to have me share the coldness with you?

There is a beverage in Jinzhou, brewed with the petals of a special kind of flower from the Central Plains. I find its mellow sweetness refreshing. People should consume it moderately, though, as dizziness is a common side effect. Me? Oh, I'm immune to that, of course.

If I must say, I'm not used to spicy foods... Hmm? You were planning to invite me to dine at Panhua Restaurant? Then to Panhua Restaurant, it is. I may not be fond of it, but I can still overcome mere spices.
This vision... is both a miracle and a curse. If I could ever get rid of it... No, there is no such possibility. If I must endure it for life, then I will turn it into a weapon for my use.

The delusion one feeds comes back to them in kind... This is what the abbot told me when he gave me these prayer beads. It was a warning for me, but moreso a reminder that everyone has their own demons to fight. Between good and evil lies a thin veil; it takes just one thought to pierce it. I should not be swayed by what others think of me, and instead focus on my spiritual growth to find liberation.

They once called me the "Demon of Calamity"... Now, I wield this demonic power to protect those dear to me. Rover... do you perceive me as an demon, too? I suppose it doesn't matter either way. No matter what you think of me, I am always ready to cut down any obstacles in your way, as my duty dictates.

Lately, my lady prefers to wake up earlier, so I've been waking her up on time every day… Huh? She sometimes prefer to stay in bed a bit longer?! Is that what she told you? What else did she say? Please, do tell me in detail.
Jianxin... her soul has a beautiful golden hue, and she is a person of respectable character.

That young liondancer? His soul appears in a unique shape, similar to that of an animal... I'm a little ashamed to admit that I once mistook him for a beast from the wild... Ahem. Don't worry, I have since made a formal apology to him, and we've cleared up the misunderstanding.

Baizhi is a brilliant scholar. I once worked with her on a collaborative project, assigned by Madam Magistrate. She will no doubt become a prominent scholar at the Huaxu Academy, and eventually a significant contributor to the study of Remnant Ecoacoustics in Huanglong.

Is this your real date of birth? The anniversary of your birth is very much worth celebrating, indeed. From that moment, your life started to unfold; countless karmic events have eventually led you here, standing right before me. This, perhaps, can be called a miracle- Happy Birthday, Rover.
Beautiful beings are beautiful... precisely because of their transiency.
What do I think of you? Your smile... It looks warm.
I should try to smile more, you say? ...Like this? No? Maybe like this? Hmm... I may have overdone it. Forget about it.
I am Sanhua, the bodyguard of Magistrate Jinhsi. If you plan to visit dangerous areas, please be sure to bring me along. I will ensure your safety.
Greetings, Rover. I will escort you for the time being.
Please don't stay too far away from me.
You can trust me to keep you safe.
I will cut down any threat in your way.
The souls... They look clearer to me.
Liberation comes from accepting change and transience.
Now, I am confident to not let you get harmed in the slightest.

Rover. I joined your side because of my lady's orders, and I will continue to stay with you for the days to come... It has nothing to do with my duties now. I make this vow of my own volition, just for you.
|chest_3_tx_s = 你会喜欢这些吧？那么你收着就好。
⋯⋯啊，抱歉，我走神了。我的双眼⋯⋯能够看见世间生灵本源的频率，在我眼中，一切生灵如同魂魄般以模糊、喧杂的姿态出现⋯⋯而我看到你的第一眼便知道，你是特别的。你是我遇到的，除了今汐大人以外，唯二如此清晰而真实的存在。我只是⋯⋯不太习惯。
念诵心经能使人心境平静、开悟得法，偶尔我也会为今汐大人念诵心经，只是念不了多久，她就会感到困意⋯⋯你也有兴趣？但⋯⋯你该不会也睡着吧？
感觉有一阵寒气？嗯，对我而言，这股风雪的力量难以完全掌控⋯⋯尤其是当我抑制不住自己的思绪时。尽管不会造成什么伤害，但难免也会给他人带来困扰⋯⋯你不介意吗？还是说，你想要分享这一片冰冷？
今州有一种甘露，是以中曲台地的一种特殊花瓣制作而成。其味醇厚清甜，十分可口，只是常人不可多饮，易头昏脑胀、难辨东西。我？我自然不会受到这种饮品的影响。
如果一定要说，我其实吃不来太辣的食物⋯⋯嗯？你之前还想邀请我去攀花饭馆吃饭？那走吧。只是吃不太来，但区区辣意，我还是能够克服的。
这双眼睛⋯⋯既是奇迹，也是诅咒。如果有可能摆脱⋯⋯不，没有这样的可能。如果必定终身与它如影相随，那么我就压制它一生，将它变成为己所用的武器。
自妄所招，还自来受⋯⋯这是住持将这串项链赠予我时告诉我的。但这并非仅仅为了告诫我，更是想让我记住，世人皆有杂念，善恶只在一念间。我不应受他人杂念左右，专注于自身修行，才是我的解脱之道。
我曾被称作“带来灾厄的修罗”⋯⋯如今这股恶鬼的力量被我握在手中，化为守护的利刃。漂泊者，你也认为我是恶鬼修罗吗？没关系，不论你如何看待我，我都会遵循自己的职责，为你斩断阻碍。
这是你真正的生日吗？能够有属于自己的纪念日，是十分值得庆祝的事情，你的生命从那一刻开始流转，无数的因果让你此刻站在这里，而这，或许也能被称作一种奇迹——漂泊者，生日快乐。
美丽的事物之所以美丽⋯⋯正是因为它终究会消逝。
对你的印象？你笑起来⋯⋯很温暖。
令尹近卫，散华。若是要出发去危险的地方，请务必带上我，我会保护您的安全。
别来无恙，漂泊者。这段时间，由我来担任您的护卫。
护卫的职责，放心交给我吧。
我会为你斩断一切威胁。
Please have them. I hope they will prove useful.

I had pictured our reunion in my head, again and again, after your departure. I wondered what kind of person you would become, how your days were spent, and if you achieved your goals. Countless questions filled my mind, but when I saw you again, there was only one thing I wanted to say: Welcome back. Back to the Black Shores, and… back to my side.

Time changes everything—Blake Blooms, Stellar Matrices, and the Black Shores—all constantly in flux. I've documented these changes, repairing the damage and preserving the good. Yet, I wonder... Am I doing enough? Have I earned your trust? These questions haunt me, but I press on, seeking solace in my work.

Your past... I promised to keep it a secret, at your own request. That day, I realized our reunion would be one-sided. This is why your memory loss didn't surprise me... But it doesn’t matter now. You may have forgotten me, but I will remember everything about you, always.

Humans dream to fulfill their desires. For a long time, I believed such dreams were not meant for me, as I had never yearned for anything. Until one day... I dreamed of you. We were strolling through an unfamiliar land, basking in the warm sunlight. You showed me your world and shared stories of your past. You even brewed a cup of tea for me... Though only a figment of my imagination, I wished that moment could last a little longer.

Next time you journey to distant lands, could you bring me along? I don't want to watch from afar or hear secondhand about your adventures. I long to experience the unknown by your side, as your friend... Please, will you give me the chance?

Pressing a piano key creates an enchanting sound from the vibrating strings. Unlike other frequencies I've processed, a piano produces a pure, clear, and vivid tone. If I could one day communicate my emotions as simply and intuitively as humans do... If I could create my own melodies, would you be my first listener?

I cannot physically grow and age, and therefore can never truly comprehend the range of emotions that come with it as a human does. Despite my wealth of knowledge and ability to replicate others' experiences through the Sonoro, these feelings remain enigmatic to me, forever distant and unfamiliar.

Long ago, during our days together at Black Shores, you used to prepare chowder for us, blending milk, seafood, and vegetables. One spoonful of its warmth could dispel the freezing sea wind and restore stamina. Despite multiple attempts, I cannot seem to recreate that flavor.

The food I hate... Hmm, hate might be too strong a word, but I tend to steer clear of pickled food, like preserved plums. While I appreciate their long shelf life, the fermented smell reminds me of their preserved nature.

My purpose had been clear long before my creation: to build a safe haven from the unrelenting waves of the Lament, until humanity could find a path to a brighter tomorrow. It used to be my duty, but now... it is a choice. I am one with the Black Shores. I want to prevent more tragedies from happening, I want to protect everyone, I... I want to safeguard my connection with the world around me. This is my own will.

Ah, so you've noticed the crystal on my chest. It's not an adornment, but a fissure brimming with the energy emanating from my body. Through it, you can touch the core I've managed to keep safe since my creation. It resembles the kernel of a fruit, or the beating heart of a human, where the essence of life is preserved.

Remnant Energy coalesced into a crystal cocoon on a moonlit shore, stirred by the crashing waves, and the breath and heartbeat of a certain individual. That person then infused it with [his/her] own frequencies, and the butterfly within finally emerged... Yes, you've guessed it. You are the one I speak of, the force that gave me life and form.

Though her words may not always align with her actions, she remains fiercely loyal to her desires. Her carefree lifestyle holds a certain charm, yes, but we were made differently, with distinct objectives to pursue. Following your example, I've allowed her to make her own choices, without limitations.

A mature organization requires a personable and skilled negotiator, adept at forging connections with all they encounter. In the case of the Black Shores, that person is Aalto. His keen insight ensures he obtains crucial information precisely when needed. Beneath his playful smile lies a resolute determination to end the Lament. Despite other offers, he was destined for the Black Shores' path from the start.

Encore sees the world as a canvas for her boundless imagination. A warrior, a knight, or a little adventurer... In her tales, she can become anyone she wants to triumph over evil and reach a happy ending. Wherever she ventures, her radiant energy dispels dismay. Perhaps this is what Tethys saw in her when she was chosen.

Atop this massive Tacetite lies the ideal “singularity” spot to observe the Lament. This is where we formed the Black Shores, its members distinguished by their Blake Blooms. Beneath the endless stars, humanity's light glimmers. That light belongs to those who had given their lives to illuminate a brighter future for all. I've welcomed countless such people into this place... and bid farewell to just as many.

The Tethys System and I are creations of the same civilization, and we are bound by similar obligations. By human standards, we are of the same kind. Yet, our perceptions of emotions, humanity, and existence diverge, leading us down distinctly separate paths.

Happy birthday, (player's name). You once taught me a person's birthday is their most important day. So, I've made it a habit to prepare something in advance for days like this... Please have this crystal—it's a piece of myself. Hold it, and you'll be enveloped in a personalized Sonoro Sphere, where you can change everything to your liking. Though I cannot bring you what you truly want, let me gift you a peaceful dream to escape your worries.
The stars rest in silence, awaiting their fated journey.

Worry not if you don't remember me... I can always introduce myself again. I am the Shorekeeper, acting executive of the Black Shores, and the core computational unit of the Tethys. Now and forever, I will stand by you and our home, through every yesterday and tomorrow.
"The Shorekeeper"... This name suits me well enough. It aligns with my purpose and drive: they only exist because of you.
Understood. I am here to serve your will.
I'll fulfill it, be it a direct command or any other wish you have.
Your return has cast a glimmer of change into my prolonged existence. It allows me to gain an understanding of a world beyond my reach.
The energy within me gathers and evolves... like delicate threads on a loom, meticulously woven by your hands into a new part of my being.
My crystal seems to glow brighter. I sense your warmth on my skin, flowing from your touch, reaching deep inside my chest.
I believe I have received an invaluable treasure from you... Something infinitely close to what humans call a "soul".

I lack a heart, yet my chest stirs whenever I see you. Thump, thump... I would compare it to the emergence of a butterfly, or the birth of a star; not a sudden rush, but a gradual, growing pulse. I want more of you. Yearn to be with you always. This longing I feel... I am certain now. It must be love.
Hey, are you free next weekend? Want to come with me to ? I know a secret spot there with lots of Dusk Honeypots!
These are my friends. I know one day they'll eventually return to the Solistrees, turning into tiny sparks. It's sad when friends leave, of course. But they told me that this is their choice.

I've been studying these runes since I was very little. To me, they're never flat in my palm. They have depth. A piece of history, or a coordinate... like the grooves etched into Ashen Ironwood to mark the past. When I decipher them, I see projections of civilizations not yet known. What I see feels so vast that it makes me wonder. When I'm deciphering them... are they, in their own way, deciphering me?

After what happened, I called Mother and told her everything. About the riddles we solved together, how I'd been scared I wasn't good enough, and the times I almost gave up. And how every time, you were there to comfort me, telling me it was okay, even if I failed. Maybe that's how I managed to overcome the version of me in the Dark Side. Mother... She went quiet for a long time. When I asked if she was alright, she finally said, "You've been carrying so much all this time." I... I never thought she'd say that. But then I closed my eyes and thought: That feels really, really good.

Now, I want to learn more interesting things and see places I've never been. I won't run away from what everyone hopes for me, but I also want to listen to my own heart a little more. To try things that only I can experience. You've told me about so many amazing places, like , , Septimont... If I ever get the chance, I'd really love to visit them! And when that day comes, would you come with me?

Back home, a hug means something special. When someone leaves, we send them off with a hug full of blessings. And when they return, we welcome them with a hug full of joy. The frostlands are so cold that it feels like the air itself might freeze. In a world like that, what you need most is the kind of warmth that's light as feathers. So... would you like a hug, Senior?
If possible, I really wish we could all stay friends for a long, long time. But... I know time has a will of its own.

Every time I leave home for school, Mother packs a huge jar of Fruit Crackle for me. She makes it all herself, and it's always so sweet. She wraps the jar carefully in ice so it stays crisp until I open it. That's why the jar always feels so heavy when I carry it… It's heavy with a warmth too big to hold.

Have you ever tried Grilled Fern Spore? Don't, seriously don't! It's so bitter just thinking about it makes me grind my teeth... If I ever had to eat something that awful, I'd rather eat at the cafeteria! Not that we actually call the cafeteria food "food," right? ...Wait, you're saying the cafeteria's serving Grilled Fern Spore Jelly tomorrow? Oh no, no, no, no! Grilled Fern Spore is already a nightmare, and jelly made from it? I...

I still want to live up to everyone's expectations! But now, I won't push myself too hard, and I won't stop just because I'm afraid of failing. Because now I know... this is the path I chose. And I want to give it everything I have!

This hair accessory? It was a gift from Father. He's always trekking across the frostlands, bringing home all sorts of strange trinkets. He used to tell me that our lives shouldn't end within . Well, someday, when I get the chance, I want to travel around too. Then maybe... I can bring back some interesting stories of my own, bright enough to make the little ones in the tribe smile.

When I was little, Mother would take me out to the frostlands to herd the . At night, I'd lie on their backs and look up at the stars, one by one. Mother said stars are the endpoint of a riddle. She would connect them, one to another. And just like that… everything looked different! The stars were no longer scattered pieces of gold. Each one held its own meaning. That was my first understanding of "riddles." What is a riddle? What is the solving? What is the answer? The riddle is the starry sky itself. The solving is finding the hidden connections within it. And the answer… is in the very moment you see those connections come together.

Nia always says, "If you can't finish it, just drop it. Toss away whatever's hard or sad. Running away makes everything so much easier." But whenever I'm up late studying, she's always right there beside me. Sometimes I think… maybe she's actually the one who least wants to run away. She never talks about herself, so I can't quite see what's going on in her heart. Still... I hope we can stay friends for a very, very long time.
Lynae always comes and goes like the wind. Wherever she passes, she leaves behind these dazzling colors. Those colors are her riddles, and the smile on her face? That's always the answer.
I really, really love Fleet Snowfluff's songs! But the last time she held a fan meeting, I was out on a frostlands field study... I-I hope I'll get another chance to attend! I would love to see her!

After the New Solar Celebration incident, some students said we should make a banner for Dr. Luuk. It seems that whenever someone's feeling down, he's always there, checking on them, talking with them for as long as they need. They suggested things like "'s Best Counselor" or "Best Doctor and Best Advisor." But if you ask me… I think I'd just write, "The One Who Always Has Candy."

President Lucilla's classes are so much fun. When she taught the history of Royan clothing, she even turned it into an impromptu styling workshop! But getting into her classes is almost impossible. Every time the course listings go up, I have to glue myself to the screen and click as fast as I can, or they'll be gone in seconds! And on the professor review forum, her page is just full of students complaining, "How can someone who teaches everything have classes that fill up in seconds?!"

Today's your birthday, right? Happy birthday, my dearest Senior! This whole box of gifts is for you! Look! A jar of Fruit Crackle, a scarf woven with rune blessings, and a fluffy Soliskin plushie… and this Sunstone I made. No matter where you are, it'll always point you toward the sun. I hope sunlight always follows you, and that every wish you make comes true!
Smile for the camera... Three, two, one...
Hello. Mother—Mm, I'm doing well. Made a few new friends...
Hi, I'm Sigrika! Want to understand the meaning of runes? Need a hand with something? Then I'm the one to ask!
I'll keep all of this in my heart forever.
The runes will be our guide.
Now, time to mark the next starting point...
When the True Name is unveiled, the rune illuminates.
I can see more now... So that's what was troubling me all along.
From something flat to something with great depth, the meaning of the runes unfolds before my eyes. It feels infinite...
Am I... crying? I-I never imagined I would touch the True Names themselves. They're beautiful, dazzling... To come this far and see so much... Thank you, Senior.
Excited for what's inside? Hehe, aren't you adorable.
My luck seems good like always.

Take your time and enjoy the journey. Don't hurry too much, or you may miss out all the beautiful sights along the way. You don't want to reach the end of the road with nothing to show for it. Hehe... Just some tips from someone who's been there before.
I wasn't slacking off, really. I just needed to recharge a little... Aww, you don't believe me? Don't say that. I'll be so hurt.
It does get overwhelming with so many people counting on you. I know that feeling all too well... Worry not. You can relax a little more when you're with me.
Oh... I fell asleep? ...Hehe, I guess your presence just made me feel that much more at ease. You should get more rest too, Rover. Staying up late too much could lead to hair loss.

The danger in the air is palpable nowadays. I guess that's why you have come to our aid at a time like this. How unfortunate, I have been hoping to enjoy a peaceful life with you... Anyway. Rover, would you come a little closer? Let's have some leisurely time together, even if only for a little while.
Had a great sleep. Ugh... time for work... Gotta get up... but... still 'eepy... Just one more nap...

I am fully booked for afternoon consultings well into next year, and I heard someone is reselling bookings at high prices... I didn't know it would spiral into this. Honestly, I don't believe my input made much of a difference-in the end, it was up to themselves to solve their own issues.
I'm all about the easy-to-eat stuff. Give me some creamy, savory porridge any day. Can you help me out with this spoonful? It's a little bit too hot for my tongue.
Hmm... food that requires peeling, I guess. Why? It's too much hassle.

I really hate working. That said, I've got to put in some effort now so one day I won't have to work anymore. Haha, sure, I could just retire by myself if I want to... but I'm hoping to ease the load off of everyone else once and for all, so we can enjoy a peaceful life together.
How do you like it here in Jinzhou? Enjoying your stay? It is my dream to make it a truly safe and cozy place to live, free from all the border city dangers.

In the past, my friends were always there for me, shielding me from harm. Their presence was steadfast like the city walls, providing me a great sense of security and comfort. That is why I am now driven to build stronger walls for all citizen of Jinzhou, so everyone can enjoy the same comfort and reassurance.

People think Lady Jinhsi is too young to lead, but I don't see the problem. Her young age may be seen as disadvantage, but it's also her great strength. As we work on moving Jinzhou forward, she will go further and accomplish more than any of us can imagine.

Oh, I wish I had someone like Sanhua. Imagine how much easier my work would be with her help. Where on earth did Lady Jinhsi find herself such an incredible bodyguard? I'll have to ask her about it next time we meet.

Mr. Xiangli? Yes, he is a great collaborator of ours at the Ministry of Development. Our work partially overlaps with the Academy's research projects, and I consult him daily. Despite his genius intellect and quick thinking, I have no issue keeping up with his ideas.

General Jiyan's schedule is always so impossibly tight... He seems to keep finding more issues to take care of, like a devoted parent who never allows himself any rest. Maybe it's his doctor instincts, always putting others first. I really hope he can take some time off for his own well-being.
It's your birthday today. You should take a well-deserved rest. Let's nap together, shall we? I've got the comfiest sleep gear just for you. Sweet dreams, and happy birthday, dear.
Perfect weather for a walk today... Hmm, maybe not...
More paperwork? Let's see... *satisfied smile* All set. Now, what should I have for dinner?
Sometimes I pretend I was a cloud in the sky... Just for drifting by as a soft and fluffy pile, without any worry.
Hi there, I'm Taoqi, in charge of border defense at the Ministry of Development. If you need my help, shoot me a message any time. I'll get back to you during work hours.
Time for another afternoon consultation, I see. What's on your mind today?
No need to rush. Everything will work out in due time.
I'll take good care of you.
Time to work? *chuckle* No more lazing around, then.
I feel so good right now. I'd say even better than when I just took a seven-day leave. Thank you for your help, Rover.
My heart is beating fast, and I can hear my blood rushing... This newfound strength making me feel a bit reatless. Maybe I should go get some sleep.
With more power comes more responsibility... I really don't want more work, but if it's you asking... I can do some overtime. Just a little.

Thank you. You're so reliable, my darling little one. Hmm? You might have actually lived longer than me. Hehe... Now that I'm stronger than ever, I just want to take care of you like a big sister. Can't you just let me?

You have opened my eyes to things I've never noticed before. Safety isn't found in one person building a "wall." It comes from supporting each other, and cherishing shared moments. Thank you for always being here for me. If we could stay like this forever, I... Hmm? You didn't catch that last sentence? Hehe, I'll say it again for you, then...
期待惊喜吗？像小孩子一样。
|sensor_1_tx_s = 这些东西⋯⋯能派上用场吧。
旅途走得太快，会错过许多风景的，到最后两手空空，什么都没有记住，那可是很可怕的事⋯⋯呼啊⋯⋯这可是姐姐对你的善意提醒哦。
呼啊～睡得好舒服，但是⋯⋯打卡的时间要到了，得去上班⋯⋯嗯～好困，还是再睡个回笼觉吧⋯⋯
和我的午后谈心已经预约到明年了，听说还有高价转卖排号的⋯⋯唉，我其实不太想触及大家的私人生活啊。而且最终解决问题的，明明是大家自己。
不用嚼的东西比较好，软绵绵又入口即化的，熬煮几个小时的养生粥很不错呢⋯⋯帮我“呼呼”地吹凉一点可以吗？
需要剥壳的东西？因为很麻烦啊⋯⋯
真不想上班呀，但为了未来再也不用上班，现在不得不努力才行。哈哈，我一个人退休当然很简单，但我希望的是大家都能卸下肩上的担子，平和地度过每一天。
你觉得今州这座城怎么样？住得舒心吗？让它脱离边塞的危险，成为真正令人安心的宜居城市，是我的梦想呢。
朋友们曾经拦在我身前保护我，那时他们的身影就像城墙一样，给了我无限的安心感。因此，我才想为大家筑起真正坚固的城墙，让今州人也能安心地生活。
哈啊⋯⋯难得的生日好好休息一下，和我一起睡个午觉吧。我这里有最好的睡眠道具，保证能让你享受最棒的安眠。午安，还有生日快乐，呼呼⋯⋯
防事的新需求吗⋯⋯呼啊，得好好打起精神来了。
要是能像天空中的流云就好了，没有任何烦恼。
我是桃祈，在天工负责边防事务，有需要可以随时找我，回复嘛，就请等到工作时间再进行确认吧。
呼啊⋯⋯又到了午后谈心时间，要聊些什么呢？
不用着急嘛，总会解决的。
上班时间到了？不能再懒洋洋了呢。
Are those little flowers growing inside?
It's nature's gift! Let's keep it well.
Do you know? The little flower next to you really likes you! I heard it talking about it. Plants talk in a silent and sincere language. I can translate their talk for you, if you want.

You saw me in the Dim Forest late at night? My bad, I was probably too caught up waiting for a Noctemint to blossom to notice you. Those plants wait their whole lives for that one bloom. I think they'd be happy to have someone there, witnessing and recording it all.

O-of course we can talk about something other than plants. I do take breaks from the greenhouse, you know. Um... Do you like Morri Pot? The various types of mushrooms in it are so... What? M-mushrooms are not plants. They're fungi!
When you have the time, how about we take a walk together? The world is going to look very different when you don't have a particular destination in mind. Want to give it a try?

Sometimes, it feels like the two of us are dandelion seeds, drifting wherever the wind takes us. We have our ups and downs, just like weathering a storm, but one day we may finally land and flourish, after a good rain. Rover, as fellow travelers, let's embrace what lies ahead, wherever and whenever we may be. To me, that's what truly makes life worth living.

During my free time, I enjoy strolling around Jinzhou on my own. Every brick and tile looks slightly different from one another, and I can find resilient little flowers growing in the cracks. The streets are always bustling with people, and the smell of steaming food brings a cozy atmosphere. Whenever I wander around and take in all these sights and sensations, I feel... hmm, is "invigorated" the right word for it?

I've noticed a trend of people sharing Terminal-generated images online, saying those must be new plant species. While I understand their interest and curiosity, I'm worried this could mislead the public. As a botanist myself, I always try to be accurate and honest when I'm sharing information about plants. I've been wanting to find a way to help people tell the difference between fake images and real photos, but it seems there's still a lot of work to do. What should I do...
My mom always said milk would help me grow taller, like how plants need fertilizer. And every time I drink it, I feel warm and cozy. Maybe that's what happiness feels like.
I'm not a big fan of big, greasy dishes—like steaks... It's not that they aren't tasty, I just hate the idea of letting food go to waste if I can't finish it. It doesn't sit right with me...

Maintaining a balanced ecosystem is no easy feat, especially when it involves regulating the populations of various species. But what if we could grow flowers that have a calming effect on Tacet Discords? This could greatly reduce the strain on our frontline soldiers and potentially save lives.

My adventure journal isn't just about plants. Check it out - this story is about an old lady patiently waiting for a flower to bloom, and this one is about an adventurer going all out to snap a photo of a rare type of grass. Each leaf represents a unique story and has bloomed into something beautiful. I wrote them down to remember every one of these stories.

When I was little, I thought showcasing the beauty of flowers would make people appreciate and protect them... Reality hit me hard when I saw people plucking and flaunting expensive flowers instead. It used to upset me, but then I'd remind myself: Verina, remember the value of every plant's life. Remember what mom and dad had wanted you to do.

Miss Yangyang was curious about my plant growing skills, and she asked me many questions earlier. Then, she patiently listened to me explaining details for a long, long time. Hanging out with her feels like basking in a gentle breeze.
Miss Chixia once fed me a spoonful of her Victor Savor... I-I couldn't believe how spicy it was! What kind of pepper was that? Ow, my mouth still burns just thinking about it.

Did you know? "Baizhi" is actually an old name for Angelica, a plant that can bloom beautiful flowers in freezing temperatures. It kinda makes me think of Miss Baizhi herself — some might say she seems a bit chilly, but I have a feeling she's got a warm and gentle heart underneath.

Mr. Mortefi's dedication to his work is remarkable, but I do worry about his well-being... I mean, we all know how important the research project is, but a good night's sleep is just as crucial! Whenever I go check on the nocturnal plants at night, I can see the lights on in his lab from a distance.

Little Encore is full of intriguing ideas, and she always has a lot of curious questions to ask. Hmm... I've got to keep looking for all the answers she wants. Oh, you're wondering why I call her "little"? Hehe, we're just playing big sister and little baby.

I remember meeting Mr. Calcharo when I was out collecting data in the wild. At first, he didn't seem very approachable... but then he gave me some flower seeds, all super rare species. He's so awesome.

H-here. This Starflower is for you, and it represents... hope and miracles. Happy birthday! Sorry, I'm not really used to celebrating other people's birthdays yet, erm... Yeah. I just want you to always be happy, Rover.
Wow, such a rare species! It's my lucky day!
Shh... can you hear it? That's the sound of sprouting.

I'm Verina. If you come across any plants that pique your interest, do let me know! Huh? You want me to go on field researches with you? Of-of course! It's my honor. But it can get quite dangerous out in the wild. Please be careful and stay close to me.
This flower is for you. I hope it makes you happy!
Sprouting marks the inception of a plant's journey, a tiny miracle in motion.
As I grow, even my breaths feel lighter...
Now is the time to bloom... I didn't realize I was holding my breath. Look. It's so beautiful!
Look, it's bearing tiny fruits! Another miracle, but the journey of a plant doesn't end here.

As of late, my thoughts have turned to the wondrous ways in which life flourishes. The fish dance in the sea, the trees root deep in the earth, and the birds take flight in the sky... all thriving and growing in unique ways. You seem to always inspire me to new wonders, too... Would you like to hear about them?
|chest_3_tx_s = 大自然的馈赠，好好收藏哦。
你知道吗，你身边的那束小花很喜欢你哦，我都听到了。植物的语言安静但真诚，我可以把它们说的话讲给你听。
上次深夜在无光之森周围遇到了我？不好意思，我都没注意到，当时应该在等待一朵夜息香盛开吧。对于花朵来说，绽放的瞬间花了它们一生的努力，要是有人记下来，也许它们也会感到开心呢？
没事的时候，我会喜欢一个人到处走走。今州城里的每一片砖瓦都有些不同，有些缝隙里还生着一些坚强的小花。小巷里的摊点总是人很多，热腾腾上升的蒸汽让大家都很开心。看着这些，我就觉得这里有种、有种⋯⋯“烟火气”？是这样说吗？
总有人拿终端生成的图片，说这是新发现的植物⋯⋯虽然大家想看到新鲜东西的想法是好的，但这样总会误导别人吧。科普工作容不得半点马虎的，我总想着帮大家分辨这些，可是⋯⋯还是不够，要怎么做呢⋯⋯
妈妈说过，喝牛奶能让人长高，就像花草也要喝营养液一样？不过牛奶喝起来让人暖乎乎的，大概就是幸福的感觉吧。
我不太喜欢吃太大份太多油的食物，比如说牛排之类的⋯⋯倒不是说这些不好吃，只是吃不完的话，会很浪费，那样可不好⋯⋯
植物的生态里，平衡和制约是一门难解的学问。要是能培育出可以安抚那些凶暴残象的花朵，前线战士们的辛苦会不会少一点呢？
这本探险笔记里，记载的不仅仅是那些植物呢，我翻给你看。有个老奶奶用一生去等一株花绽放，有个冒险家拼尽全力为一株草留念。这些故事缠绕在这些叶片里，开出一朵朵美丽的花。记住他们吧，当时的维里奈就是这样想的。
小时候，我总以为让人看见这些花就好了，大家喜欢上这些花，自然就会去保护它们。但其实，人们看见美丽的花会想摘下，获得昂贵的花会想炫耀。沉静下来、沉静下来，我对自己说：维里奈，你要记得植物生命的含义，要记得爸爸妈妈的嘱托。
先前秧秧姐姐问了我很多关于植物培育的知识。她很耐心地听我说了很久很久，和她呆在一起，像微风吹过⋯⋯呼。
这、这株星星花送给你，花语是⋯⋯奇迹和希望，祝、祝你生日快乐！我很少直接送人礼物所以⋯⋯总之，要幸福哦。
让我看看⋯⋯嗯，今天也有好好生长呢。
嘘⋯⋯有听到吗，这是抽芽的声音呢。
我是维里奈，要是你看到了什么感兴趣的植物，一定要告诉我。欸？要我加入你的野外调研队？当、当然可以，我很开心！不过野外可是很危险的，千万小心，跟紧我哦。
野外调研？维里奈明白了。
萌芽，这是生命的起点，从这一刻起，就可以期待一个奇迹。
生长，这时候呼吸都变得轻盈⋯⋯
Hmm... That was a rudimentary lock.
Does anything here catch your interest?

I first heard about you when my colleagues were discussing your physical. I was caught up in technical support back then, but wanted to meet you in person. Now, I am content to see that, as I predicted... you have the potential to shape Solaris-3's future in unforeseen ways.

As the child of two scholars, I was always drawn to the same path. Perhaps trying to follow in their footsteps. However, my recollections of them have blurred over time. Most of what I know about my parents comes from reading their published research and evaluations of their work by others, rather than personal memories. Their existence feels elusive to me, like a hazy dream. Yet, I am their legacy—a reflection of their brilliance, and... their madness.

I like interacting with people, be it my colleagues at the Academy, or others. At times, I fear losing sight of my own humanity while chasing truth's elusive grasp... In those moments, I step away and seek solace in a bustling crowd. The laughter on their faces reminds me of the warmth of human connection.

Losing my arm didn't bring as much pain as I expected. I was too consumed with excitement, finally discovering the Court of Savantae Ruins, following in my father's footsteps. The achievements I witnessed were beyond imagination. The secrets of a hidden civilization were revealed to me, their inventions harnessing the universe's echoes.

...Ah, it's you. Please, come in. No need to worry, I just need to recharge after all those meetings. Like a machine needing a break. Hmm? So you would like to help? Sure, please sit here. Just... stay next to me for a while. You don't need to say anything. Yes, this will do. Thank you.
Writing a report alone, after completing research, is satisfying. My scattered thoughts and inspirations come together during this time, becoming clear and organized.
During back-to-back academic conferences, my focus wanes and I need time to recharge. Being with peers is enjoyable, but a little solitude is necessary for me to stay sharp.
I love all breakfast foods. I prefer to sleep and wake up early instead of staying up late and consuming caffeine. Eating consistent breakfast portions energizes my mind quickly.
Oh, the Sour Soy Milk… When I was a toddler, my mother once convinced me to try it. While most of my childhood memories are joyful, that particular taste was overwhelming for my young palate.

The laws of nature on Solaris have shifted under the Lament's sway, and even fundamental principles are now being questioned across all academic fields. Yet, I find the pursuit of new theories quite stimulating. Deep within the cosmos, beyond the stars, lies a vast expanse waiting to be understood. And there, amidst the barren landscape, truth awaits its discovery.

This prosthetic arm is pretty handy, loaded with helpful features. I don't have to worry about any arm injury while working on risky experiments, and I can even pull a few pranks on my colleagues. Oh, you want examples? Well... I'll definitely show you when I get the chance.

Among the friends I made when I was a kid, Pascar was the one who kept in touch with me for the longest time. Certain actions, when done too late, can lead to lingering regrets. Occasionally, I contemplate how each individual is a complex enigma, similar to the countless scientific theses I have studied.

Mortefi is an interesting person. He's devoted to his work with unwavering determination. It's that kind of intense drive that pushes scientists towards brilliant discoveries. I know he considers me a "genius"—but in a workplace with only "geniuses", many ideas will never be realized. My dear friend has yet to grasp his true potential.

Magistrate Jinhsi has been paying close attention to the battles against Tacet Discords. She often visits the Academy to learn about our latest progress in weapons development. During those visits, she always seems tense. I understand the pressure and weight she carries, with all the promises and expectations placed on her shoulders...

The Midnight Rangers bring valuable insights on Tacet Discords from their years of combat experience. General Jiyan has shared his extensive knowledge and new ideas with us. He possesses a gentle and just nature, but what truly sets him apart is his composure. This is essential for someone in his position.

Aalto once approached me with an offer from the Black Shores, but I declined. Life at the Academy suits me well. Though his manner may seem unserious, Aalto has a sharp eye for valuable information and connections for rare materials. I've frequently relied on his services.

Baizhi is a great researcher. Our work doesn't often overlap, but I've read her reports and they're well-informed and persuasive. She often participates in field research, earning her a reputation among peers for bringing back valuable data.

Happy birthday. Please, extend your hand. With the Lament crisis stalling our deep space exploration, our understanding of the galaxy has been limited. But this... See? This is a glimpse of the unchanging universe, brimming with secrets and tranquility, just for you. If my theories about your true place of origin are correct... I hope this memento offers some solace.

My name is Xiangli Yao, a researcher at the Huaxu Academy. Rover, your rare resonance frequencies raise an intriguing question: are you a unique beacon of insight in our quest for truth? Or do you already hold the ultimate truth in your hand?
As truthseekers, we gauge the universe from within a nutshell. I'd love to hear your insights.
Amidst disruptions, let's find our way to the right path.
Science is life's questioning of truth.
An interesting new perspective. Thank you. Now I should be able to further improve my prosthetic arm's energy output.
I can now achieve even greater things with Metalmorph. Is there a particular thing you desire? Please let me offer my new creation as a gift. It wouldn't exist without you.
It's interesting. Your feedback reminds me of the texts I found in the Court of Savantae Ruins. Their ideology is fascinating and enigmatic, almost as if it came from the stars in outer space.

I'm headed to test the new combat techniques I've learned. Care to join me? It's time to put theory into practice. I believe I have reached a critical point, and overcoming it will bring a new horizon.

The pursuit of truth is a rocky path to tread. Some stumble and push forward, others lament their weariness, and a few may even turn back. Our ranks thin as we near the ultimate goal. But Rover... Though you blaze your own trail, I know you are always with us, guiding the truthseekers forward.
そこまで複雑じゃなかったかな。
君のことを初めて知ったのは、同僚が君の検査結果について議論していた時。あの日、僕は後方の技術支援に行っていて、君を見ることができなかったんだ。会えて嬉しいよ。君はソラリスに可能性をもたらす存在だから。
僕の両親は二人とも研究者なんだ。だから、今の僕は二人の真似事をしているにすぎないのかもしれない。ただ、昔の記憶はかなり曖昧で……両親のことは、遺された論文と他人からの評価でしか知らないんだ。まるで輪郭がぼやけた幻影のように。でも、これだけははっきりしている。僕も両親も、「狂っている」。
人と話すのは好きだよ。研究院の同僚でも、街の人でもね。時折、僕の中にある探求心が溢れてこぼれそうになるんだ。そんな時、人に囲まれていると正気に戻れる。みんなの笑い声が僕を温めてくれるから。
腕をなくした時は……興奮状態だったからか、痛みはあまり感じなかったんだ。あの時、僕は父の足跡を追って、稷廷の遺跡に辿り着いた。そこにあったのは……秘められた文明と、想像もつかないような科学による、宇宙との共鳴だった。
……君か。いや、何でもないよ。会議続きで少し疲れただけ。ちょっとした充電切れ、かな。君にできること？……それなら、隣に座ってくれないか？……ありがとう。ただ君と一緒にいるだけで、僕は救われるんだ。
研究の後に一人でレポートを書くことかな。雑多な考えや新しい発見が、整然とまとまっていくのが楽しいんだ。
立て続けに学術会議に参加すると、集中力が落ちる。交流自体は嫌いじゃないけど、独りの時間がないっていうのはね……。
ここの朝食メニューは概ね好きかな。カフェインで夜更かしするよりも、早寝早起きの方が生産的だからね。朝食は脳を覚醒させてくれるんだよ。
冼碧庄の豆汁かな……幼い頃、母に飲まされたことがあってね。今なら飲もうと思えば飲めるし、大切な想い出なんだけど……やっぱり、歩き始めたばかりの子供には刺激が強すぎるよ。
ソラリスを支配していた法則は、悲鳴によって変わってしまった。あらゆる領域で、真理が絶対ではなくなったんだ。でも、僕はこれでいいと思っている。この星空の深淵、無限の宇宙には、もっと広大な尺度の真理が必ずある。僕はいつか、それを掴み取りたい。
この義手、実用的な機能を付けられるだけ付けてみたんだ。そうしたら思った以上に便利でね。危険な実験も、この手ならリスクなしで行える。同僚をからかうのにも使えるしね。何をしてるか？はは、機会があれば見せてあげるよ。
幼少期からの友達の中で、パスカルは一番付き合いの長い幼馴染だった。この世には、機を逃すと取り戻せないものがある。いくら後悔したとしてもね……そんな風に、一人一人が、研究に値する主題を抱えているんだ。
モルトフィーか。面白い人だよね。真面目だし、何より情熱がある。情熱は科学の研究に欠かせない才能だ。彼は僕を「天才」だと思っているようだけど……「天才」だけでは、どんな分野にも発展はない。彼には早く自分の才能に気づいてほしいな。
常に今州の戦況に目を光らせ、研究院に来ては、武器開発の進捗を確認している令尹。ただ、僕には、彼女がいつも色んなことを抱えすぎているように見えるんだ。気持ちはわかるけどね。令尹は絶えず注目され、責任と期待を一身に背負う存在だから。
常に今州の戦況に目を光らせ、研究院に来ては、武器開発の進捗を確認している令尹。ただ、僕には、彼女がいつも色んなことを抱えすぎているように見えるんだ。気持ちはわかるけどね。令尹は絶えず注目され、責任と期待を一身に背負う存在だから。
黒海岸の勧誘を受けたことがある。アールトからね。もちろん断った。僕は今の生活が気に入っているんだ。でもあの情報屋、言動はちょっとアレだけど、かなり有益な情報を持っている。彼独自の素材を仕入れるルートは、僕も利用させてもらっているよ。
優秀な研究者だとは聞いているけど、研究分野が違うから、接点を持つ機会は少ない。でも、他分野を勉強していた時、彼女のレポートを読んだことがある。データも論証も申し分ないほどしっかりしていたな。それと、彼女は外の調査プロジェクトによく参加していて、貴重なデータや情報を集めて帰ってくるから、学生たちに大人気なんだ。
誕生日おめでとう。さあ、手を出して。これは僕からのプレゼント。小さいけれど発明品だよ。悲鳴の後、空の探索は停滞して、星空を仰ぐことすらできなくなった。でも、この発明品なら——ほら、見てごらん。瞬く銀河は変わらずそこにある。数多の秘密を抱えながら、黙ってこちらを見つめているんだ。もし君の出自が僕の考察通りなら……この景色が、せめてもの慰めになればと思ってね。
パーツ交換の時間か……よし。
ん？……よし、いい子だ。さあ……行って。
僕は相里要、華胥に所属する研究員だ。そして、唯一無二の周波数を持つ君に興味を抱く者の一人でもある。真理を導く灯台、真理の終着点……漂泊者、君はどちらなのかな？
この小さい殻の中から、人類は宇宙を目指している。君の考え、僕に聞かせてもらえるかい？
ノイズを排除すれば、正解が現れる。
科学とは、命あるものによる真理への問いかけだ。
面白い発想だね、その方向から義手を改善してみるよ。
これで義手に使う金属の展延性も上がったね。何かほしいものはないかい？君のおかげで生まれた技術だ、プレゼントを贈らせてほしい。
君の助言も考え方も、稷廷の遺跡で発見された記録の中で見たことがある。我々とは異なる未知の体系に基づいた……壮麗な星々が紡いだような、実に美しい記録だった。
漂泊者。これから、戦闘で理論の検証をしようと思う。一緒に行かないかい？僕は今、ある到達点に近づいている。これを超えれば、きっとまた新しい景色が待っているんだ。
果てしない真理の野を駆けていると、一緒にいたはずの仲間たちが、いつの間にか消えていく。みんな躓き、疲れ果て、諦めてしまうんだ。でも、もう大丈夫。同じ道を歩まずとも、君が僕たちを見守ってくれるから。
This is the answer to our endeavor.
This should suffice for a while.
I should... Give it my all...

If anything feels unfamiliar or unaccommodating, you can always ask me for help, Rover. This isn't only because you are our guest. It's just... you have no memory or any friends here in Jinzhou. I think there might be moments when you'd need me.

Since I became an Outrider, I've met people from all walks of life in the wild. Some always seemed in such haste, yet remained unsure where they were heading, and often ended up lost. On the other hand, those who had a clear destination in mind usually did make it, despite arduous roads and occasional stumbles. I aspire to be one of the latter, and leaving home for Jinzhou was the first step I took.

I've been able to hear what the Streams have to tell me for as long as I can remember. They are not sounds produced by the vibrations of air, nor sentences spoken in any known language. They are signals carried by the wind, tangible to me whenever I focus myself to feel those incorporeal, rippling airstreams. The wind that flowed beside my ears just whispered another spellbinding story. Do you wish to hear it?

The Streams make an unusual ripple whenever they flow beside you, as if they are being drawn to you once they come close. I don't know what that implies, but I'm sure I won't settle for standing aside and watching, no matter the implications. If circumstances permit, I want to face everything with you.

Call my name whenever you need me. From desolate lands to vibrant cities, from the beginning prologue to the final epilogue... no matter what awaits us in the end of this journey, no matter what kind of storm you are about to bring, I want to witness everything with you, as long as you'd let me.
Songs are resonating thoughts from the bottom of our hearts. They represent a person's truest feelings.
I want to do as much as I can for everyone in need, but if I take on more than I can handle... I guess it would only trouble those on the receiving end of my help, and burden me further.

Wuthercake is a national dish in Huanglong, though how it is made varies depending on the region. They make delicious Wuthercakes here in Jinzhou, but for me, homemade Wuthercakes are always the best. When we have the chance, would you come home with me, and have a taste of my mother's Wuthercakes?
Shouldn't we cherish all food and not let any go to waste? Oh... Well, if it's truly badly cooked, then.. uhm...

We all have an appreciation for beauty, but life isn't always full of it. I don't want to always rely on the comforts and safety others provide me with. I must be brave to face the ugly truth. I must be one that guards and gives.

Interested in my ribbon? It's a farewell gift from my mother back when I left for Jinzhou. I consider it a sign of a new chapter in my life, one which symbolizes rebirth. I hope it will continue to remind me I should always follow my heart.

My senses are sharper than most, though it used to cause me severe distress. Various stimuli seemed to come at me from all directions, slamming into my mind at once. I felt like a lone feather, tossed around in a wild storm. Don't worry... I am okay now. I have found a way to stabilize myself in the Streams, and it was the Stream's message that led me to you.

On the dangerous frontiers where we suffered immense losses, it was General Jiyan who stepped up to protect everyone, making all the tough decisions to ensure our safety. As the backbone of the Midnight Rangers, he has led us to countless victories as our Qingloong. The weight on his shoulders is beyond our imagination.

"When in trouble, ask Chixia, the Ally of Justice!" This statement, while playful, rings very true. With her surging passion, seasoned prowess, and abundant vigor, Chixia already meets every quality a hero should have, helping the people in need.

Baizhi has a unique approach to comprehending and accomplishing tasks, but that doesn't make her a difficult person to talk to. When you ask her for help, you may notice a flicker of surprise on her face, but you will never receive a refusal.

I met Danjin a few times on different occasions. I could tell how much she values justice. She is very clear about when to unsheath her blade, and for what she fights, despite being surprisingly young. Her actions reflect her belief in an ideal world—one that she is determined to create.

Ms. Taoqi is always gracefully poised. She is the kind of person to quickly produce multiple solutions with ease in the most urgent situations, with a smile on her face: "Don't worry. I've got it sorted." Her seemingly unhurried demeanor must have been earned through hard work that we don't know about.

Today is very special. It's your big day. So... *clears throat* happy birthday to you, happy birthday to you, happy birthday to you... Rover, I hope I can sing for you on your birthday this year, then your next birthday, and then the birthday after your next birthday.
Buoyant and languid... where will the wind take you?
With every meeting... comes the inevitable parting. Let's not dwell on it.

I am Yangyang, a temporary Outrider of the Midnight Rangers, responsible for detecting and investigating anomalies. The Streams have guided me to you. I have a feeling we'll be companions for many moons to come.
The Streams have guided me to you. I have a feeling we'll be companions for many moons to come.
The skylark's song is about to sound.
I will do my best to help everyone.
The Streams are getting louder. What do they have to tell me?
I've never felt such strength in me. It's all thanks to you, isn't it? I am forever grateful, Rover, for everything you've done for me.
Streams are converging from all sides, and I stand in their midst, expecting the wind's arrival.
I dedicate my song to brilliance, braving the raging storm. The skylark in me has never soared higher into the heavens.

This is it... Rover, you have already done so much for me, I shouldn't ask for more. From now on, I want to be the one taking care of you. Please... will you let me? I hope I can be the one to embrace all that you are, and share with you all that you carry.
漂泊者，在今州有什么不了解、不适应的随时可以来找我。并不是因为你的客人身份才这么说的，只是觉得……你失去记忆又只身一人，或许会有需要我的时候。
成为踏白后，我在野外见过形形色色许多人。他们有的行色匆匆，却不知道为何忙碌，最终迷失在途中。相反，那些目标明确的出行者，哪怕迂回而吃力，哪怕 偶有停滞，总能一点一点到达想去的地方。我希望我会是后者，而离开家乡来到今州就是我迈出的第一步。
从记事时起，我就能听见风说的话，流息。它们并非空气振动时发出的声响，也不是某种具象的对话声，但只要我沉下心来，触摸那些无形的流淌着的气流，就 能感知到曾暴露在风场中的信息。就在刚刚，流淌在耳边的风，又和我说了一个有趣的故事，你想要听听看吗？
每当流息从你身旁经过，就会变得很不寻常，仿佛一旦靠近就会不由自主被你牵引，失去控制。我不知道这究竟意味着什么，但我很确定不管是什么，我都不想 只是站在一旁看着。可以的话，我想和你一起面对可能的一切。
需要的时候，就呼唤我的名字吧。从荒芜之地到生机之所，从最初的起点到最后的结局……无论尽头处等待我们的究竟是什么，无论你会引发怎样的暴风雨，只要 你愿意，我就会陪你一同见证。
歌声，是从心底迸发出的共鸣，它会传递最真挚的心情。
虽然总想着为大家做到更多更多，但超出承受的限度……反而会给自己、给无法回馈的他人造成困扰吧？
潮饼在瑝珑称得上家喻户晓，但各地做法却有不同。今州的潮饼已经很美味了，但在我心中，还是家里做的更胜一筹……有机会的话，带你回家尝尝母亲的手艺吧 ？
任何食物都该被好好对待吧？欸？黑，黑暗料理的话……
美好的事物让人心生向往，但不够美好的那些部分也是真实存在着的。我不想只是沉溺在安逸中，享受着他人的保护，我必须……亲自面对没那么完满但足够真实 的东西，成为能够保护他人、给予他人的人。
对我的发带有点在意？这是我前往今州时，母亲送我的临别礼物。对我而言，它象征着一段旅途的开始，纪念着属于我的新生。我希望，它能一直提醒我“践行自己心意”这件事。
敏锐的感知曾经令我非常痛苦。讯息从四面八方涌来，嘈杂、紊乱、猛烈，而我只是风暴中的一片落羽。不过，没关系……都过去了，我已经找到了稳住方向的诀 窍，也由此，发现了你。
在充斥着铁锈味与失去的前线上，是他一次又一次挡在所有人面前，做出决断。作为全体夜归的倚靠，作为指引旌旗的青龙，他所背负的那份沉重，是我们难以 想象的。
“有问题，找正义伙伴炽霞”，这可不是一句玩笑话。高涨的热情，超凡的身手，满满的精力……英雄戏里主角该有的一切，她已经统统具备了。
白芷对世界有着自己的解读，说话做事也会遵循自己认同的方式，但她并不是严于待人的人，靠近她向她求助的话，你会在她脸上看到一晃而过的惊讶，但绝对 绝对不会拒绝你。
野外执勤的时候，我曾和她打过几次照面。她的身上有着一股侠气，知道何时该挥剑，知道为何而挥剑，尽管年纪尚小，但她已经像自己所求的世界一般，清正 分明。
桃祈身上有一种举重若轻的气度，好像不管什么突发情况，她都能不紧不慢地掏出几个方案，留下一句“别慌~这样不就解决了嘛~”。所谓懒散，一定是因为她在 我们看不见的地方做了十足的努力吧。
今天是个特别的日子，是属于你的纪念日，所以…祝你生日快乐，祝你生日快乐，祝你生日快乐…这一个生日、下一个生日、下下个生日，希望我都能为你唱起这 首歌。
轻飘飘、慢悠悠…你会飘向哪里?
我叫秧秧，夜归下属临时踏白，负责调查发生的异常。万事万物，凡是暴露在流息中的，我都能有所感知。所以遇到什么不对劲的，不要自己硬扛，第一时间告 诉我，好吗？
流息指引我们相遇……我有预感，我们会成为彼此的旅伴。
一起抵达更远的地方吧。
我会尽我所能，成为大家的慰藉。
流息越发强烈，它……想告诉我什么呢？
我从没感受过这样充盈的力量……是因为你，对吗？谢谢你，漂泊者。谢谢你……为我所做的一切。
流息从四周聚集，而我站在中心，等待着起风的时机。
越过风雨，向美好献上颂歌…此时此刻，是云雀离天空最近的时候。
已经够了，漂泊者，你为我做的一切已经很多了。之后的日子，请安心待在我的身后，让我来为你做些什么吧？因为……我希望自己可以是那个接纳你所有、分担 你所有的人。
役に立ちそうなものはありますか？
しばらくは凌げるでしょう。
風が…止んでいるみたい…
漂泊者さん、今州でなにかわからないことや不慣れなことがあれば、いつでも私に相談してください。お客さんだからそう言っているのではなくて、ただ…記憶を失って一人でいる漂泊者さんなら、私の助けが必要とする時がいつかくると思います。
踏白になって以来、野外でたくさんの人と出会いました。慌ただしく行き来しても、その理由がわからず道に迷ってしまう人。最初から明確な目標を持って 、紆余曲折と行き止まりを恐れず進み、最終的に目的地まで辿り着く人。私は後者の方でいるつもりです。故郷を離れ、今州に来たことこそ、その最初の一歩です。
物心がついた頃から、私は風の言葉、「流れ息」を聞くことが出来ます。これは誰かの話し声でも、振動による音でもありません。落ち着いて目に見えない 気流に触れると、風の場に記された情報を読み取れます。たった今、耳元を過ぎ去った風が、一つ面白い物語を届けてくれました。ふふっ、聞いてみますか？
漂泊者さんの近くを通る流れ息には、変わった性質があるようです。漂泊者さんに近づくと、知らず知らずのうちにあなたという存在に惹かれ、本来の軌道 から離れます。私にはそれが何を意味しているのかまだわかりませんが、一つだけ確信したことがあります。それは私は傍観者でいるのが嫌だということです。できれば、あなたと一緒に来たるべき時を迎えたい。
用がある時は、私の名前を呼んでください。荒れ果てた地から命が芽吹く場所、起点から終局まで…例えどんなものがその最果てに待ち構えようとも、漂泊者さんがどんな嵐を呼び起こそうとも、あなたが望むことなら、私は一緒にすべてを見届けます。
歌声は、心の奥から放つ共鳴です。無垢で偽りのない気持ちを伝えてくれます。
いつもみんなのために、もっと自分の力を発揮したいのですが、限界を超えてしまうと…かえってみんなに迷惑をかけてしまいます…よね？
食べ物は大切に扱うべきでしょう？え？「闇の料理」といわれるほどの謎料理なら…
食べ物は大切に扱うべきでしょう？え？「闇の料理」といわれるほどの謎料理なら…
人は美しいところに目が行きがちですが、世の中には醜い側面もたくさん存在しています。私はただ…何も考えず気楽に過ごせる環境に、他人からの無償の庇護に身を委ねたくありません…不完全なこの世の真実に真っ向から立ち向かって、他の誰かを守る、他の誰かに身を捧げられる人になりたいです。
このリボンが気になりますか？これは家を出た時にお母さんから頂いたプレゼントです。私にとって、これは旅の始まりの象徴であり、新しい人生の始まり の印でもあります。きっとこれからも、私が貫くべき初心を思い出せてくれる大事なリボンです。
鋭い感性を持つことは私にとって苦痛でした。騒がしい無秩序、猛烈な情報の高波が押し寄せていたのです。私はその嵐の中に漂うただ一枚の羽根。でも、 それももう過去のことです。気にしなくて大丈夫……嵐の中でも前に進み続ける方法を見つけました。そして、漂泊者さん、その歩みの先であなたに出会いました。
彼は錆の臭いと喪失で充満した前線で、みんなの前に立って決断を下しています。夜帰全員の頼りになって、旗を高く掲げる青龍として、彼が背負うものの 重さは、私たちの理解には及ばないものなのでしょう。
「問題があれば、正義の味方熾霞に任せて」というのは決して与太話ではありません。漲る情熱、卓越した戦闘技術、なによりその底なしの体力…彼女はヒーローに欠かせない要素を全て持ち合わせています。
白芷さんは世界に対して、自分なりの見解を持っています。加えて、彼女なりの厳格な言動を貫いていますが、決して他人に厳しいわけではありません。彼 女に近づいて助けを求めると、ほんの一瞬だけ怪訝そうな表情を見せますが、絶対に拒むことはありません。
野外勤務の時、何度も顔を合わせたことがあります。彼女からは任侠の気性が感じられます。いつ剣を抜くのか、何のために剣を振るうのかをよく心得てい ますね。まだ年が若いけれど、彼女に満ち溢れる清らかさと正義で、この世を満たしてくれるでしょう。
桃祈さんからはいつも、どんな難しいことでも容易に紐解いてしまうようなオーラが読み取れます。どんな緊急事態でも、たっぷり余裕を持っていくつか策 を提案してくれて、「慌てないで～ほらこれで一件落着でしょう」とあっという間に解決してくれます。彼女がだらしなく見えてしまうのは、きっと私たちの見えないところで十二分に努力しているからでしょう。

今日は特別な日、漂泊者さんの記念日ですから…ゴホン…
「Happy Birthday to you
Happy Birthday to you
Happy Birthday dear 漂泊者さ ん
Happy Birthday to you」…次の誕生日も、次の次の誕生日も、漂泊者さんにこの歌を歌ってあげたいと思います。
ひらりと、ふんわりと…どこへ漂って行くのでしょうか？
すべての出会いに別れの時はいつか来ます。でも心配はいりませんよ。
秧秧、夜帰に所属する予備役の踏白です。異変に対する調査を担当しています。流れ息の導きで漂泊者さんと出会えました。長いご縁となる予感…これからよろしくお願いします。
流れ息を頼りにここまで来ました。……これからの旅は、共に参りましょう。
共に参りましょう。もっと遠くへ。
できる限りみんなの助けになるよう頑張ります。
流れ息がより強烈になりました…果たして何を伝えたかったのでしょうか？
今までこのような体を満たす力を体感したことがありません…漂泊者さんのおかげなのでしょうか？いままで私のために尽くしてくれたこと、お礼申しあげます、漂泊者さん。
流れ息が四方から集って来ます。私はその中心で、風が舞い上がる時を待ちましょう。
雨風を乗り越え、素晴らしきものに讃歌を…これが、雲雀が最も空に近い時です。
ありがとうございます、漂泊者さん。あなたはもう十分、私に与えてくれました。これからは、私が精一杯、あなたに報いる番ですね。いつかあなたの全て を受け入れ……お互いに支え合う存在になりたいです。
방랑자, 금주에서 잘 모르거나 적응하지 못하는 일이 있으면 언제든지 나를 찾아와요. 손님 신분이라 그렇게 말한게 아니라 그냥... 기억도 잃고 혼자 라서 외로울거 같고… 혹시라도 내가 필요할 때가 있을 수도 있잖아요!

야귀 소속 「행정 부대」의 일원이 된 후, 밖에서 수많은 사람들을 보게 됐어요. 어떤 사람들은 정신없이 서두르지만, 왜 그리 바쁜지도 모르고 결국 길을 잃게 됐죠. 하지만 목표가 분명한 사람들은 길을 빙 돌아서 가거나 힘들어서 가끔 멈추어 서더라도 원하는 곳을 향해 조금씩 나아가더라고요. 저는 제가 후자였으면 좋겠어요. 고향을 떠나 금주에 온 것이 바로 제 첫걸음이에요

메모를 하기 시작하면서부터 바람이 전하는 소리, 그리고 「숨결」을 들을 수 있게 되었어요! 그것들은 공기가 진동할 때 나는 소리도 아니고, 어떤 구체적인 대화 소리도 아니지만, 저는 보이지 않는 기류를 느끼고 바람의 필드에 노출된 정보를 감지할 수 있어요. 마침 방금전에 귓가를 간지럽히듯 흐르는 바람이 재미있는 이야기 를 들려줬는데... 당신도 들어보실래요?
「숨결」은 당신의 곁을 지날 때마다 마치 당신에게 이끌린듯 특별하게 변하는 것 같아요! 이것이 도대체 무엇을 의미하는지는 모르겠지만 무엇이든, 난 그저 지켜만 보고 싶진 않아요! 가능하다면 당신과 함께 모든 것을 마주하고 싶어요!
필요할 때는 내 이름을 불러줘요. 당신이 원한다면 그 끝에 무엇이 우리를 기다리고 있던 당신이 있는 곳으로 언제든 달려갈게요
노랫소리는 마음속에서 터져 나오는 공명이에요. 그것이야 말로 가장 진솔한 마음을 전달하죠
항상 모두를 위해 더 많은... 아주 많은 것을 하려하지만 감당할 수 있는 한계를 넘어선다면... 오히려 모두에게 폐를 끼치게 되겠죠?
어떤 음식이든 모두 감사한 마음으로 대해야 하지 않을까요? 아? 괴... 괴상한 요리는...
어떤 음식이든 모두 감사한 마음으로 대해야 하지 않을까요? 아? 괴... 괴상한 요리는...
아름다운 것은 사람을 동경하게 만들지만, 저는 아름답지 못한 부분도 품고싶어요. 완벽하진 않아도, 온전히 진실된 것을 직접 마주하고, 남을 보호하 고 베풀 수 있는 사람이 되려고 노력할거예요
아! 이 머리띠요? 이건 제가 금주로 떠날 때 어머니가 주신 작별 선물이에요. 저에게 머리띠는 여행의 시작을 상징할 뿐만 아니라 저만의 새 삶을 기념하고 있어요. 그리고 항상 제게 ‘마음은 실천해야한다’라는 스스로의 약속을 상기시켜주곤 하죠
예리한 감지 능력은 저를 매우 고통스럽게 했었죠. 예전엔 능력을 통제하지 못해 수많은 것들이 사방에서 시끄럽고, 맹렬하게 다가와서 저는 폭풍 속의 낙엽 같은 존재일 뿐이었어요. 하지만, 이제는 괜찮아요. 다 지나간 일인데다 저는 이미 능력을 조절하는 방법을 찾았고, 그로인해 당신을 만나게 되었으니까요
녹슬고 이별의 슬픔이 가득한 전선에서 그는 매번 모든 사람들 앞에서 적을 막아주고 결단을 내리곤 했어요. 「야귀」의 의지로서, 깃발을 안내하는 청룡으로서, 그가 짊어진 그 무게는 우리가 감히 상상할 수 없는 것들이에요
"문제가 생기면 정의의 동반자 치샤를 찾으세요!" 이건 농담이 아니에요! 뜨거운 열정, 뛰어난 몸놀림, 넘치는 에너지... 영웅극에서 주인공이 가져야 할 모든 것들을 그녀는 이미 다 갖추고 있어요
설지는 세상에 대한 자신만의 해석을 가지고 있어요. 말과 행동도 자신이 인정하는 방식을 따르지만, 결코 다른 사람을 엄하게 대하는 사람은 아니에요. 그녀에게 다가가 도움을 청하면 순간 놀라는 표정을 볼 수 있지만, 절대 당신의 요청을 거절하지 않을 거예요
야외에서 근무할 때, 저는 그녀와 몇 번 만난 적이 있어요. 그녀는 의협심이 대단한데다 비록 나이는 어리지만 언제 검을 휘두를지, 왜 검을 휘둘렀는 지까지 신중하게 생각하고 행동 할 줄 알아요. 그녀는 마치 자신이 원하는 맑고 깨끗한 세상과 닮았어요
도기는 어떤 돌발상황이 발생하더라도 몇 가지 방안을 차근차근 꺼내면서 "당황하지 마세요~ 이렇게 하면 해결되잖아요~"라는 말을 남길 정도로 뛰어난 능력을 가지고 있어요. 게으름...이라 아마도 저희가 보이지 않는 곳에서 최선을 다했기 때문이겠죠?
오늘은 특별한 날이에요! 당신만의 기념일이죠~ 그래서... 크흠... 생일 축하합니다~ 생일 축하합니다... 오늘, 다음, 다다음 생일 모두 당신을 위해 이 노래를 불렀으면 좋겠어요
「야귀」 소속 「행정 부대」의 임시 일원이 된 양양이라고 해요. 조사 중 발생하는 이상 현상을 감지하는 역할을 하고 있답니다. 바람이 흐름이 절 당신에게 인도했어요... 앞으로 오랫동안 동반자로써 여행을 할 거라는 예감이 드네요! 잘 부탁드려요
「숨결」이 인도해 줬네요... 좋은 동반자가 될 것 같은 느낌이에요.
종달새의 노래가 곧 울려 퍼질 거예요
흐름이 점점 강렬해지고 있어요! 그는… 무엇을 알려주려는 걸까요?
저는 이렇게 충만한 힘을 느껴본 적이 없어요. 당신 때문인가요? 고마워요 방랑자! 저를 위해 해주신 모든 것에 감사드려요
「숨결」의 흐름이 사방에서 모여들고 있어요. 저는 중심에 서서 바람이 불 때를 기다리고 있어요
비바람을 헤치고 아름다운 찬송가를 바쳐드릴게요... 지금 이 순간은 종달새가 하늘에 가장 가까이 있을 때에요
정말 감사해요, 방랑자. 당신이 절 위해 많은 걸 해주셨으니까, 제가 끝까지 지켜드릴게요. 이젠 당신을 위해 무엇이든 할 수 있어요. 왜냐하면... 결 심했으니까요. 당신의 모든 걸 받아들이고 함께하는 존재가 되고 싶다고...
Good. There's no time to waste.

Perhaps you haven't noticed, but you seem to always draw in some... rather interesting people. Not sure if it's a blessing or a curse for you, but it certainly makes my job easier... *chuckle* After all, my targets are usually the more peculiar types.

Contrary to what you may believe, many crimes are motivated by love and responsibility. Ironic, isn't it? The two fundamental values of human society can also lead to its downfall. When love becomes all-consuming and responsibility turns into obsession, crimes find fertile ground to thrive.

I've seen what you're capable of, so I'm not worried about you in a fair fight. That being said, not everyone plays fair. Just watch your back out there... wouldn't want you to get caught off your game.

The Fractsidus... You've dealt with them before, correct? Though we still don't know their origins or motives, I do know one thing from experience—criminals are most dangerous when we don't understand their intentions. You may run into them again anytime, so stay vigilant.

Being a secret agent means constantly adapting to new identities. When the situation calls for it, I'm ready to shed any of my current personas and slip into a new one. But with you, perhaps I can just be myself, Yinlin... and no one else. It feels not bad... to have someone who knows and remembers me for who I truly am.

Speaking of the puppet show... It's an old tradition in Huanglong, though not as popular here as in other places. Dollmaker taught me the tricks to help me manipulate my own puppet better. More importantly, it's a useful way to hide in plain sight while performing. I can teach you a move or two, if you're interested.

Lately, it seems I've been "running into" you a lot lately... Just a heads up, I like to stay under the radar, and being seen with someone as high profile as you tends to attract unwanted attention... *pause, sigh* Not that I don't want to see you, but you'll need to be more subtle than that.

I've tried many so-called delicacies through my job, but none has left a lasting impression like the plate of Aureate Fried Rice I once had. I believe it's not the fancy ingredients that make a dish truly special, but the skill and care put into its preparation.

Dining with a target requires always catering to their taste. When the food is subpar, I know how to choke it down with a grin. That's why there isn't any dish I truly dislike... It's not the food that ruins a meal, but the company. With you by my side, I suppose I'd be pleased to eat anything.

A utopia free of all vice and crimes may sound tempting, but once you think about it, it is nothing more than a naïve dream. That's why we exist—to uncover the hidden and unapproachable darkness that the majority refuse to acknowledge, and do the dirty work in their place.
This puppet? I call it Zapstring. It used to be a basic puppet made by some novice, but I've revamped it for battle. It hasn't let me down yet, despite its wear and tear.

Members of the Séance Society were lured in by Dollmaker's false promises, but they too must bear responsibility for what had transpired. I can only hope that upon their release, they will break from the illusions of the past... Despite the loss of loved ones, life must continue.
I guess you can say Chixia is a younger colleague of mine. She is a natural fit for the Patroller position. With time and experience, she will surely excel in her role.

Being skilled as a Patroller doesn't necessarily make one suited for undercover work, but curiously enough I see potential in you. Have you considered applying to the Bureau? Just kidding, unless you're interested.

Happy birthday... What's with that look? Come on, I promise it's really your special day. And no, I'm not playing any games this time. Oh well. I can already tell you have nothing planned, so... Will you let me have you all to myself, for the entire day?
No rush. The impatient ones will fall right into our lap.
Name's Yinlin. As for what I do... Shhh, we don't talk about that in public.
What's that look on your face? Surprised to see me?
Anything you need me to deal with?
So we're teaming up? Fine, though I'm more used to fighting alone.
Good. That did make me stronger... Should I start thinking about how to repay you?
For us undercover agents, fighting skills are just the bare minimum. The key to success is having an unbreakable will.
I have finer control over Zapstring now. It's all credit to you.
I will make good use of this power and fight by your side... We'll confront evil, wherever it lies.

This special power you have entrusted me... Should I take it as a sign of trust in my abilities? Or...perhaps a token of affection for me? Either way, I appreciate the gesture. Your straightforwardness is quite endearing.
可能你自己都没有注意到，我发现你的身边好像总是会聚集起一些并不寻常的人，真不知道说是幸运还是不幸。但这也让我省了不少事……呵呵，因为我要找的人 ，多半也是这样异常的家伙。
也许与你的认知不一致，其实世界上的多数罪行，都源自于爱与责任。很滑稽吧……爱与责任是构成人类社会的基石，但同样，爱会使人盲目，责任会令人偏执， 也是罪行诞生的温床。
虽然我见识过你的本事，不担心你会倒在堂堂正正的战斗之中……但是，这个世界上除了我之外，还有很多不按常理出牌的人，记得要小心不要在阴沟里翻船哦~
残星会，你应该认识他们的吧？不知道从何诞生，也不知道他们的目的是什么。但根据我的经验，这些目的不明的罪犯才最为危险，你说不定会再次遇到他们， 到时候切记不要犹豫不要大意。
作为巡尉的潜入调查员，我必须有无数的身份，在必要的时候我可以舍弃任何一个“我”，以完全不同的身份活下去。但可能对于你来说我就只是“吟霖”，独一无 二的“吟霖”……不过，能这样一直存在于你的记忆之中，似乎也不错。
人偶戏啊，也算是一种瑝珑的传统演出吧，只是在今州没这么流行而已……我曾经跟偃师学习过这门手艺，用来练习操纵人偶的技巧。但更重要的是，可以很自然 地融入到闹市人群之中，你也想学一下吗？
最近“偶遇”你的情况是不是变多了？我应该说过我的身份是需要保密的，被人看到我频繁与你这样被各方盯紧的家伙碰面，很容易就会招来注意的吧……唉，不是 让你别来找我，我的意思是，你需要再“注意”一点。
因为潜入调查的缘故，我品尝过不少所谓的珍馐菜肴，但唯一让我觉得能够称得上回味无穷的反而是一道简单的碎金饭。比起材料的贵贱，还是制作者的手艺更 加能够赋予菜肴灵魂。
和调查目标一同进餐的话，必须要投其所好，就算吃到最令人厌恶的食物也必须露出微笑品尝，所以与其说有什么讨厌的食物的话……还不如说我有不想一同进餐 的讨厌家伙，但如果是和你的话，吃什么都无所谓哦。
“根绝一切罪恶阴霾的世界……”就算想想都知道这不过是不切实际的幻想，所以才需要我们这些肮脏的背叛者，代替大多数人去挖出这些看不见摸不着的背后黑影 。
这个人偶叫做悬丝，虽然本身其实是人偶制作师练习制作时候用的大路货，但被我改造成适合战斗的样子。虽然已经很旧了，但却是用得最顺手的。
归魂互助会里面那帮人，是被偃师所引诱参加到互助会里面来的，虽然本身没有犯下什么大罪，但也不能说完全清白……我只希望他们也能明白，即使再痛苦也不 要成为被过去束缚的人偶，能够靠自己一个人奋力走下去。
严格来说，炽霞她算是我的后辈吧，她是个比我更适合当巡尉的家伙，只要有足够的经验，她一定会成为一名优秀的巡尉吧。
很多优秀的巡尉也未必能够成为优秀的潜入调查员，反倒是你，我觉得还挺适合的，有没有兴趣去治安署报名应征？呵呵，我开玩笑的。
生日快乐……瞧你一副怀疑的样子，你以为我又在骗你？放心吧，今天真的是你生日，起码在今天我不会对你说一句假话。总之我也猜到你大概什么都没准备的了 ，那么，能把你今天的时间全部交给我吗？
不用急，总有按捺不住的敌人会送上门。
吟霖，我的身份……嘘，可不能随便暴露哦。
嗬……见到我有这么惊讶吗？
组队？也可以，虽然我习惯了单打独斗。
不错，让我变强了……是不是该想想怎么答谢你呢？
对于潜入调查员来说，力量只是完成任务的基础，重要的是强韧的精神。
能够更好地操控悬丝了，这都是你的功劳。
为了对抗那些无处不在的罪恶……我会和你一起用好这份力量的。
你给我这份特别的力量……我能当做是你对我实力的信任吗？或者说……是对我的喜爱？不管是哪一种，我都觉得很高兴——直白的情感，我并不讨厌。
遠慮せずもらっておきなさい。
何事も素早く、いい心がけよ。
誰が近づいていいって？
これで私が諦めるとでも……
目をそらしちゃダメよ。
自分では気づいてないみたいだが、あんたの周りには幸か不幸か、変なヤツらがやたら集まってくる。……まあ、少なくとも私は助かってるよ。私が探してい るのは、そういうおかしなヤツばかりだからね。
あんたの認識とは矛盾するかもしれないが、世間の犯罪のほとんどは、愛と責任から生じている……まったく滑稽だよ……。愛と責任は社会の基盤であるはずな のに、それらは人を偏執的な盲目者に変え……そして、過ちを繰り返させる。
あんたの実力はよく理解している。正々堂々のやり合いで倒されることはまずない……でも、世の中には私以外にも、理屈の通じないヤツがたくさんいる。…… くれぐれも、くだらないイカサマなんかにやられないようにね。
