残星組織（フラクトシデス）は知っているわよね？いつ出来たのか、目的すらもわからない組織。私の経験上、そういう得体の知れないヤツほど危険なもの は無い。きっとあんたもまたヤツらと出会うことがあると思う。決して油断しないで。
巡尉の潜入捜査員として、私はいくつも顔を持つ必要がある。いざとなれば、この「私」も捨て、また別の「私」として生きていく……。でも、あんたにとっ ての私は単なる「吟霖」で……たった一人の「吟霖」……。ふふっ、そうやってあんたの記憶に残っていくのも、悪くない。
瑝瓏の伝統的な人形芝居が好き。でも、今の今州じゃあまり流行っていないようね……。私はかつて人形をよりうまく操るために、偃師からこの芸を学んだこ とがある。でも本当に任務で重要なのは、街中に自然な形で溶け込む技術。どう、あんたもやってみない？
ここ最近「ばったり」会う機会が増えた感じがしない？前にも言ったと思うけど、私の存在は内密にして。あんたみたいな「人気者」と接触してるところで も見られたら、私まで悪目立ちしちゃう……もう会わないなんて言ってないわ。でも、もう少し「慎重」に。
潜入捜査を行う上で、様々な高級料理を食べてきたわ。でも、その中で唯一印象に残ったのは、ただの黄金チャーハン。やっぱり料理において注目すべきは 、使った食材ではなく、料理人が注ぎ込んだ魂だと思うの。
調査対象と一緒に食事をする場合、行くお店、頼む料理は相手の好みに合わせる必要がある。つまり、嫌いなものでも、さぞ好物を食べているかのように振 舞わなければいけない……だから、嫌いな食べ物は何かという問いに対しての答えは、一緒に食事をしたくない人、ね。でも、あんたとであれば、何を食べても問題ないわよ。
「邪悪が根絶された世界」……それが非現実的な幻想だなんてことはわかってる。だからこそ私たちのような「汚い裏切り者」がいる。人々の目に代わり、見 えない闇を探り出すために。
この人形は「懸糸（ケンシ）」。元々、人形作りの練習に使われていたありふれたモノだけど、私が戦闘用に改造したの。たしかに年季は入っているけれど 、これ以上使いやすいものなんて後にも先にもきっと存在しないわ。
反魂互助会の連中……偃師に操られていたというだけで、彼ら自身が大きな罪を犯したわけじゃない。それでも、彼らに罪はないのかと聞かれれば、そうとは 言いきれない。彼らには……過去に縛られる人形にならず、苦しみに耐え、自力で前に進んでほしい。私はただ、そう願っている。
厳密に言えば、私の後輩になるのか……。熾霞は私よりもよっぽどこの仕事に向いている。十分な経験を積めば、きっと立派な巡尉になれるわ。
優秀な巡尉が必ずしも優秀な潜入捜査員になれるとは限らない。でも、あんたはなかなか筋がいい。どう、あんたも目指してみる気はない？ふふっ、冗談よ 。
誕生日おめでとう。……なに？その疑わしい顔。嘘なんてついてないわよ。安心して、今日はせっかくの誕生日。そんな日に偽りの言葉なんて使わないわ。ど うせ予定なんてないでしょう？今日は一日、私に付き合ってちょうだい。
焦らないで。ゆっくり待てば、敵は自ずと現れる。
吟霖よ。私の正体は……どうか内密に。
ホ……そんなに驚かないで頂戴。
チーム？まあ、いいわ、一人の方が慣れてるけど。
悪くない……強くなった気がするわ。何かお返しを考えないと。
潜入捜査員にとって、強さは任務を完遂するための基礎。その上で求められるのが強靭な精神。
ケンシの精度が上がった……あんたのおかげよ。
あらゆる場所に蔓延る悪と戦うため……この力、存分に使わせてもらうわ。もちろん、あんたと一緒にね。
あんたがくれたこの特別な力……これは私の実力への信頼の証？それとも、私自身への友好の証？……どちらでも嬉しく思うわ。そういう直接的な感情、嫌いじ ゃない。
넌 눈치 못 챘을 수도 있겠지만, 네 주변에는 항상 평범하지 않은 사람들이 모여드는 걸 깨달았어... 이게 행운인지 불행인지는 모르겠지만 말이야. 그래도 수고를 덜게 됐네... 하하, 내가 찾는 사람도 보통 일반적이진 않은 사람들이거든
네 생각과 다를 수도 있겠지만, 사실 세상에서 일어나는 범죄들은 대부분 사랑과 책임에서 비롯돼. 좀 웃기지...? 사랑과 책임은 사회를 구성하는 초석이지만, 때로 사랑은 사람을 맹목적으로 바꾸고, 책임은 사람을 편협하게 만들거든... 마치 죄가 자라나는 온실처럼 말이야
난 이미 네 능력을 봤으니까 공정한 싸움에선 네가 질 거라고 생각하지 않지만... 이 세상에는 나 말고도 상식이 통하지 않는 사람들이 많아. 그러니까 항상 여러 가지 상황에 관해 판단을 내리는 게 좋을 거야
잔성회에 대해선 너도 이미 알고 있겠지? 어디서 탄생했는지, 목적이 무엇인지도 알 수가 없어. 하지만 내 경험에 따르면, 정확한 목적을 알 수 없는 범죄자들만큼 위험한 게 없어. 만약 그들과 다시 마주친다면 망설이지도, 방심하지도 말아야 할 거야
순찰관의 잠입 요원으로서 난 수많은 신분을 가지고 있어야 하지. 필요하다면 「나」라는 존재 자체도 버리고 완전히 새로운 신분으로 살아가야 할 수 도 있어. 하지만 너에게 있어 난 그저 「음림」 그 자체이자, 단 하나뿐인 「음림」이겠지... 그래, 이렇게라도 너의 기억 속에 계속 존재하는 것도 나쁘지 않을 것 같아
인형극도 황룡의 전통 공연이라고 할 수 있어. 다만, 금주에서는 이렇게까지 유행하지 않았을 뿐... 예전에 언사한테 인형을 조종하는 법을 배운 적이 있어. 번화가에서 사람들 틈에 자연스럽게 녹아들 수 있다는 게 장점이지. 어때, 너도 한번 배워볼래?
우연인지는 모르겠지만, 요즘 너와 자주 만나게 되는 것 같아. 업무상 신분은 비밀로 해야 한다고 말했을 텐데... 주변 사람들의 시선을 한 몸에 받는 너랑 자주 마주치게 되면 나한테도 영향이 오겠지... 흠, 내 말은 찾아오지 말라는 게 아니라, 좀 더 주의를 해야 한다는 거야
잠입수사 덕분에 진수성찬이라 불리는 요리들을 수도 없이 먹어 봤어. 하지만 유일하게 기억나는 건 오히려 간단하게 만든 황금 볶음밥이야. 재료의 값어치보다 만드는 사람의 솜씨가 음식에 영혼을 불어넣거든
수사 대상과 함께 식사를 하면 반드시 그 사람의 비위를 맞춰야 하지. 제아무리 역겨운 음식을 먹더라도 미소를 지으면서 먹어야만 해. 싫어하는 음식 은 없지만... 다른 사람과 식사하는 건 정말 싫어. 하지만 너와 함께라면 무엇을 먹든 행복한 식사 시간이 될 것 같네
「모든 죄악의 그늘을 뿌리 뽑는 세상...」 비현실적인 환상에 불과하다고 생각하겠지. 그래서 우리 같은 잠입 요원이 필요한 거야. 사람들을 대신해서 보이지 않는 검은 그림자들을 파헤치거든
이 인형은 「현사」라고 해. 원래는 인형 제작사가 연습을 위해 만든 물건이지만, 전투에 적합하도록 내가 직접 개조했어. 비록 낡았지만, 나한텐 사용하기 가장 편한 인형이야
「귀혼상조회」의 회원들은 언사에게 이끌려 상조회와 함께 한 거야. 그 자체로 큰 죄를 지은 것은 아니지만 그렇다고 완전히 죄가 없다고도 할 수는 없지... 난 단지 아무리 아프고 슬퍼도 그들이 과거에 얽매인 인형이 아니라 혼자 힘차게 나아갈 수 있는 존재라는 걸 깨달았으면 해
엄밀히 말하자면, 치샤는 내 후배라고 할 수 있어. 물론 나보다 순찰관에 더 적합한 아이지. 경험만 충분히 쌓는다면 분명 훌륭한 순찰관이 될 거야
훌륭한 순찰관이라도 잠입 요원 자리를 감당하지 못하는 경우가 많아. 오히려 네가 더 잠입 요원에 어울릴 것 같은데? 보안서에 지원이라도 해볼래? 훗, 농담이야
생일 축하해. 의심하는 걸 보니까, 또 내가 널 속이고 있다고 생각하는 것 같네. 걱정 마! 생일날까지 속일 생각은 없으니까. 오늘만큼은 거짓말 같은 건 한마디도 하지 않을 거야. 그러니까... 오늘 약속은 있어? 만약 없다면 나랑 같이 보낼래?
서두를 것 없어. 범인은 항상 스스로 먼저 나타나거든
내 이름은 음림, 신분은... 쉿, 함부로 말할 수 없지
하... 날 보고 그렇게 놀란 거야?
팀플레이? 흠, 혼자가 익숙하지만 이번만 특별히 함께해볼까
좋은데, 좀 더 강해진 것 같아... 어떻게 답례할지는... 고민을 좀 해봐야겠지만
잠입 요원에게 힘은 임무를 완수하는 기초일 뿐, 중요한 건 강인한 정신력이야
「현사」를 더 잘 조종할 수 있게 됐어, 다 네 덕분이야
어디에나 존재하는 죄악에 대항하기 위해... 널 도와서 최대한 이 힘을 발휘할 수 있도록 할게
나한테 특별한 힘을 줬다는 건... 내 실력에 대한 너의 믿음이라고 생각해도 될까? 아니면 설마... 나를 향한 사랑? 어느 쪽이든 기분은 참 좋네. 직설적인 감정은 매력적이거든
Worry not! Go ahead and open it! This master is here for ya!
Outta my way! I want a look!
Is that the best you got?
Luck is on MY side! Hehe... Waaahhh!
Don't let your jaws drop yet! Hehe... Waaahhh!
Huh, you're lucky to have come across me—the undisputed master of antique appraisal! Now, what do we have here? Hand over your goodies and I'll take a look!

Don't bother impressing me with your knowledge of antique appraisal, since hardly anyone knows it better than me! *self-satisfied snort* What I want in a friend is merely respect for ancient artifacts.

Hey, here's a secret–but don't go blabbing to anyone else. If you recite "Master Youhu's Poem Collection" by the City Hall, the Sentinel will totally bless you. Well, maybe it won't... but hey, at least *I'll* totally help you...

Hey, here's a secret–but don't go blabbing to anyone else. If you recite "Master Youhu's Poem Collection" by the City Hall, the Sentinel will totally bless you. Well, maybe it won't... but hey, at least *I'll* totally help you...

Antiques aren't just about how much they're worth, but the feelings they hold. For example, if an item can record this moment in time, a memory of you and me together... That will make it super important. Yes... It will be priceless... To me, at least!

I am Master Youhu, the best antique appraiser ever! Needless to say my favorite is antiques of all kinds. Some say I talk too much, but hey, if they brought me cool stuff, I'd zip it real quick. No lie.

Treasures are plenty if you look, but stealing is a total bore. Catching baddies dusk till dawn, that's what I do all along.*Yawn* Still got a bunch of losers who haven't returned what they took. Let's see who's so unlucky to cross paths with yours truly, Master Youhu!

Loong Buns are cool, they're like our tribute to the great Loongs. Food Ration Bars are cool too, they remind me of our soldier's dedication. Obviously, only the best meaningful food could ever impress Master Youhu!
Ugh, plain tea is so bitter! Who even likes that? I'll just find a chance to dump it in the cup of whoever bothers me next time. Hehe!

Why would I do this whole antique appraisal thing? To make sure the antiques end up with the right people, of course! I'm like, the go-to for anyone who actually appreciates these things. And those snotty fakers and liars? I'll show 'em what's up. Aww, it's sure tough being such an honest and awesome appraiser like me!

Nothing's ever perfect in this world, and this jade ring is no exception... Ahh, you're curious? My story isn't free, ya know! My antique appraisal fee is... Oh wait, it's my day off. I don't work for money today. Bye-bye!

I've been a genius since I was born! Like this one time, I met a dude who made bank by dissing real antiques, so he could sell them later for way more. Had the face to call himself an appraiser, huh. So I snuck into his place, stole his secrets, and posted them on the gate of the market. Pretty cool, right? Only problem was I was eight years old and couldn't run fast enough from him. *hiss*… Ugh, the pain in my head is still fresh even after all these years.
That Liondancer... Lingyang, I think? He surely knows how to come up with those Lucky Greetings. They sound cool. Almost as cool as my poems, I'll give him that!
Even though I haven't chatted with him much, I can tell that Mortefi dude is a man of culture. Fingers crossed he becomes my client one day!
A Patroller... Uhh, gotta stay away from her... Hey, I've done nothing bad! Just used a few... tricks, to get back what belongs to the right people. Surely that's not a crime... right?
We're about the same age, but Danjin's much taller than me... The jade she wears is so pretty! *sigh*... It's a shame I can't feel a single joyful frequency from it...
What's up with that mirror she carries, you ask? Oh my, oh my! That's a big, BIG secret. Not for your ears!

So, I accidentally heard it's your birthday today. And because we're like, friends or something, I made you this wooden statue of the Sentinel. It's said to protect you on your trips. Yeah, I just whipped it up on a whim! W-What do you mean it takes other people months to finish? Well I'm just amazingly talented, so of course it only took me half a day!
Hmm... Can't seem to figure out these scratch marks... Ummm... Ugh!
Hmhmm... Aha! What, you want a bite?
Time may deceive, but wisdom takes hold. Here comes Master Youhu, the great antique appraiser!
Woah! Hehe... Wanna catch me huh, you thieves?
New goodies to see? I'm in!
Just so you know, while I charge little for antique appraisals, fighting's gonna be a different price!
Alright, I'll humor you for a bit, since I'm feeling good today!
Geez, you're actually giving me all of these? Good call!
Well, I'm already super strong but... Thanks for the extra buff!
Aha! Now I'm up to my eyes in goodies, and I've got the strength to keep 'em safe too!
As per Master Youhu's professional opinion, I am invincible now! Those who don't appreciate antiques shall tremble before me!
Such power should allow me to protect all the antiques in the world... Thanks to you, I'm no longer fighting alone... Ack! Nope. This is too embarrassing to say out loud!
Found what you're looking for? Good.
Nice. Let's go check it out.
Hello there. What will it be for today? Are you here to put in some extra work, or maybe just to loosen up a bit? Of couse, you're welcome for a chat, too. One moment, I'll go make some tea for you.

Exercising is essential for us martial artists. Other people may not find the same importance in exercise, since everyone has their own unique strengths. After all, we no longer live in a time where brute force is the only solution. Or rather, brute force never really solved anything.

Rumors have been circulating about me, and I don't intend to stop them. My story isn't particularly exciting, but people find amusement in talking about it, that doesn't bother me. And with words about me getting out there, I might end up reeling in a few dunderheads. Whatever impression others may have of me, I trust your judgment will not be swayed. Or, if I may say so, I am happy to accept whatever you think of me.

I did hurt people in the past, sometimes with my hands, and sometimes through other means. Back then, I had to take the initiative... to make sure no more innocent people would fall prey to them. I had experience handling such things, and that was why I felt obligated to help. But I'm not telling you this in response to the rumors. I believe friendship is built on mutual understanding, and now is a good time for you to get to know me better.

When it comes to the business world, one is often told that it’s impossible to find true friendship. I have to concede, nobody I’ve ever known has understood me as well as you do. Though my gym has many customers, you are the only one to have become a true friend of mine. You are, and will always be welcome at my gym, my friend.
A steaming cup of tea makes an excellent remedy for sore muscles after an intense workout. It's quite effective, you should give it a try.

Nestled between the borders, Jinzhou is subject to ever-changing weather. Sustaining the dried fish I've been making for Mimi has been a difficult task... Hmm, I suppose a solution will come to me in due time.

The solid ingredients of Jinzhou Stew blend effortlessly to form a simple dish. Back in the days when I had to live far away from home, it was the only dish that I could recreate to make me feel close to my roots. I can never have enough of it
I'm not a big fan of foods that are hard to chew... Oh, it's got nothing to do with my teeth. I'm just not fond of the prickling sensation of stickiness in my mouth.
Well... I just want to maintain the stability I currently enjoy, and maybe keep my hometown safe, if I get the luxury to, haha.
Have I been keeping some kind of secret healthy drink in this flask, you ask? *chuckle* It's really just regular hot tea.

The stiffest tree is often broken by the harshest of winds, whereas the bamboo and willow survive by bending along. Finding harmony between strength and adaptability is integral to lasting success, be it in martial arts, commerce, or all aspects of life.

Lingyang often visits my gym to play with Mimi just outside the front doors, always carrying a couple of fresh tetras as treats. I guess it might be his thank-you to Mimi for all the agility training they had done together. He sure is a thoughtful young man.

I am more than happy to get an outstanding training partner like Jianxin by merely offering her a simple meal... Of course, I'm always pleased to spend time with her over a meal, whether she's here to train with me or not.
I can sense a dangerous aura from Danjin's way of fighting... I'm worried that she may have far too much burden on her shoulders at such a young age.
Every morning, when I opened the gym, Chixia was already patrolling the street with exuberant energy. *chuckle*... I must keep up with my exercises too. Can't be outdone by the younger generations.
Your poise and comfidence are impressive. Such remarkable character can't possibly be built overnight. I can tell you've experienced far more than I have.

You're always tied up with affairs, how about relaxing a bit for a change on your birthday? Here, I got you an ordermade messager, some Angelica Tea leaves, and a personalized health management planner for the upcoming year. You really should prioritize your health. Self-care comes before anything else, including helping other people, my friend.
Oh? *chuckles*.. Did you smell the dried fish I have?
Please don't worry. I've got it in check.
Hello. I am Yuanwu, and I run a boxing gym. It's not a big place, but we make sure every customer is treated with finesse. You're welcome to visit any time.
Whether you need help with working out or maintaining your health, feel free to come by my gym. We welcome all visitors.
Anything I can help you with?
It's nice to take a break once in a while.
I haven't felt this tingling sensation swimming across my veins in a while... So this ia all your doing? *chuckle* Looks like this is going to take some time getting used to.
Now that I've gotten used to it, this power feels robust and flexible. It does have something in common with my Leihuangquan.
Thanks to your help, my skills have improved and even my thunderbolts are stronger. Owing to your aid, I might be able to get a couple more scoundrels dealt with.
Thanks to your help, my skills have improved and even my thunderbolts are stronger. Owing to your aid, I might be able to get a couple more scoundrels dealt with.

Since you've gifted me such a precious treasure, I should give you a matching gift in return. Please, take this Tea Pot—it grants you free access to all the boxing gyms and teahouses in Huanglong. And... if you ever need me, just hand it to any one of the shopkeepers. I will come to your aid as soon as possible, no matter what.
有什么能用的可以收起来，以备不时之需。
你好，今日前来，是想锻炼呢，还是想做调养？当然，光是聊聊天也可以。稍等，我去为你沏一壶茶。
对于我们武者来说,锻炼当然很重要。但也不是所有人都需要锻炼,每个人都有适合自己的路子。毕竟,已经不是光靠拳头就能解决问题的时代了。又或者说,光靠拳头,从来就不能真正解决什么问题。
那些真真假假的传言……如果大家愿意谈论,我不会阻止。一来可以提供一些不算有趣的谈资,供大家消遣;二来可以放出风声,钓上几条不算聪明的鱼儿;三来 .…. 不管别人怎么说,你肯定都能保持自己的判断,又或者说,我接纳你对我的全部理解。
尽情锻炼后来上一杯热腾腾的清茶，茶的清新淡雅可以缓解肌肉酸痛。很有效的，你也试试。
今州地处边塞，天气变化难测，给小咪晾的鱼干没有那么容易保存⋯⋯唔，我再想想别的法子。
今州烩做法简单，用料扎实。远走他乡时，这是我唯一能复刻出来的家乡味道了，怎么吃都吃不厌。
我不太擅长吃难嚼的东西⋯⋯啊，跟牙口没关系，单纯就是不喜欢唇齿间黏黏糊糊的感觉。
先顾好这一方天地，有余裕的话，还想保八方平安吧，哈哈。
想知道保温杯里装的养生秘诀？哈哈，真的只是普通的热茶而已啊。
刚极易折，柔过无骨。刚柔并济、亦收亦放才能长久。练拳如此，经营如此，人生亦如此。
你平时总是东走西忙，生日就好好放松一下吧？订制按摩仪，特制清芬茶，还有未来一整年的健康管理表⋯⋯身体是最重要的，在为他人奔忙之前，要先照顾好自己啊。
嗯？呵……是闻到小鱼干的气味了吗？
你好，我叫渊武，经营一家拳馆。店不算大，但每一个客人我都会用心对待。有空的话，欢迎过来坐坐。
无论是锻炼身体，还是调息养生，有需要都可以来找我。
Some pocket money? Won't say no to that.
I'll take it as my overtime fee.
Fine. Comes with the job, I guess.
I'm off duty, it's your turn.
No… I've still got work to do...
And that was me holding back.
My shield can withstand more than that.
I can spare a minute to knock some heads around.
All of you at once. I don't do overtime.
Ugh, now I have a report to write.

So, , were you satisfied with how I handled your reception before the Carnevale? Why bring this up now, you ask? Well, gathering client feedback is part of my job. As the Montelli family's esteemed guest, your opinion naturally holds a special weight for me.

For an employee of the Montelli family, appearance is everything. No matter how busy the day gets, always present yourself flawlessly. The Employee Manual puts it best: "Impeccable etiquette and attire give you the upper hand in negotiations."

I don't hate work or overtime, so long as it serves a purpose. If I'm forced to sit idly at a desk doing nothing or sacrifice my personal time on trivial tasks... Then what I'm earning isn't a salary, it's compensation for the piece of my soul that's been taken.

You look tired, . I understand you're shouldering some heavy burdens. But I suggest you catch a break whenever you can. You don't want to end up like me. Once I pulled my first overtime, I soon found myself working around the clock. Trust me, saving the world can wait.

I used to think life was nothing but living the same day on repeat. Grinding through trivialities, running in circles until even the smallest joys faded away. But then you came along, just as I'd grown numb to this way of living. Like the Carnevale itself, you brought a burst of color into my life.
I love my job! Really. No joke. Was I smiling? No? Then you get the idea.

Listen, efficiency is everything at work. It's all about hitting the nail on the head. Some people just don't get it. Instead, they waste so much time on unimportant details, prioritizing form over substance. A shame, really. That won't solve anything. All it does is complicate things even more.
My go-to restaurant is Trattoria Margherita. Nothing fills my stomach and soothes my soul quite like a slice of pizza freshly baked by Signorina Margherita after a long day at work.
Employees of the Montelli family swear by espresso—straight, no sugar or milk—to keep themselves energized. But as for me, work is already hard enough... I'd rather treat myself to something sweet.

I grew up in Ragunna, and I know every corner of this city like the back of my hand. The sea breeze that greets you, the bustling plaza filled with familiar faces, the shiny new products in shop windows, the aroma of food from Trattoria Margherita. I hope this quiet life never ends. I hope everyone finds their place. For me, that would be enough.

Hmm? Why is this pocket watch so big? Well, this is not a pocket watch per se, but an alarm clock. In the early days when I worked for the Montellis, I almost caused a major incident by being late. After that, I've carried this alarm clock with me everywhere and I haven't been late since.

My past? Nothing worth mentioning, really. I clock in, do my work, clock out—then do it all over again. Now and then, I straighten out a few troublemakers. Were you expecting some "white-collar hero saves the day" kind of story? Then you've read too many comic books.

Lady Carlotta? Her vision has never been limited to Ragunna, or even Rinascita. Hers was about the world beyond the sea horizon. I don't know what kind of future she sees, but I'll stand by her until the day her vision becomes reality.

To me, Ragunna's fate lies in the will of its people, not the Sentinel. Many Acolytes would call this heresy, but not Phoebe. That's what makes her unique. She would never dismiss another's beliefs or efforts just because they do not align with her own.

The Fisalia family has always clung to Ragunna's traditions, stubbornly resisting change. But Signorina Cantarella, the current head, isn't as traditional as people imagine. As an employee, I do not get to influence how the Montellis handle their relationship with the Fisalias... but personally, I wouldn't mind working with her.

Brant is a skilled actor, a respected captain, and a fighter willing to sacrifice everything for truth and justice. But what I envy most is that he's never weighed down by stacks of paperwork. If I knew anything about acting, I'd quit this job, join the Troupe of Fools, and live the carefree life he does... Now, now. Just a pipe dream to keep me going.

I've seen Ciaccona perform a few times outside the city. She often sings about Rinascita's old folklore. I once asked her if she thought the age of heroes described in her poems had ended, whether heroes had already exited the stage of history. She answered that as long as there is suffering, someone will rise up to be the new hero.

It's your birthday today right? According to Ragunnesi tradition, we must put aside all work and throw a grand party with all our friends. Nobody leaves before midnight! Rest assured, I've already lined everything up in Palazzo Agrotta. Today, my job is to make sure you have all the fun.
Alright, where are we off to next?
Time to get back to work.

I am Zani. I work for the Montelli family. Hmm? Oh, that's not eyeshadow. It's proof of my hard work, a badge of honor for my dedication. Ha, if I keep saying that, I might actually start believing it myself.
Alright, what's the first thing on today's to-do list?
Is that the alarm... Alright, time to work.
As the Montelli saying goes, "A blade only stays sharp if it's regularly honed." Even if it's just for work, exercise is necessary.
Hmm? Have I become more... productive? How am I supposed to act busy now...
Such radiant lights... I hope it shines on every shadow and leaves no darkness to hide in.
Ah, such power... Perfect. Now I can be the shield that protects more people.
Words alone can't repay all you've done for me. Now, it's my turn to fight for you. Happen to need an unbreakable sword or a shield that can withstand anything?
Wow, beautiful… Oh, I'd better put them away first.

So many paintings... Ah, not that I'm complaining about the commissions! It's just, I keep finding new things that inspire me... Oh, sorry. What I wanted to say is, the sunlight on you right now is so beautiful. Can I... paint you?

I-I saved half of a lemon cake for you. Want to try it? I couldn't help myself and bought it with some of the money I saved up, as a celebration for finishing my commission. I've wanted it for so long! It's sweet but not too rich, with perfect layers. It tastes just as amazing as I imagined!

You mean those phantasms? They're just illusions. They might look vibrant and stunning, but... they're not real. I prefer a flawed reality over a perfect illusion. Even though it's tough and unpredictable, it also has its surprises, like... meeting you.

Do you ever feel lonely when you're alone? I do enjoy my own company, but after a while, I start wishing I had someone to talk to. But... whenever I try, I never know what to say and I'm afraid of saying the wrong thing, so it usually ends up awkward... But talking to you feels different. It's like a conversation I used to only dream about. I really wish we could talk like this... forever.

You know, I started a portrait of you a while ago, but I haven't finished it yet… I feel like I can't capture everything I feel for you on just one piece of paper. If it's alright, I'd like to show it gradually, through what I do and say.
My family's debt… It'll probably take me my whole life to pay it off by myself…
I have a sweet tooth. Sweet things always give me more energy!
When I cook, it feels like the flavors never blend, like the ingredients and seasonings are at odds… Are-are you interested in tasting it? Um, I'll have to practice more before you try it…
I hope… that one day, I can spend all my time painting what I truly want, leaving a piece of the real me in this world.

This brush is called Miaohua. It reacts to phantasms. When I was younger, I had trouble controlling my ability, and sometimes I couldn't tell reality from illusion… The worst time, I was trapped in an illusion for two whole days without realizing it. It was Miaohua's reaction that made me realize everything around me was fake and helped me find my way back to reality.

If your living space feels cramped, try using furniture in a single color. If prices seem unfair, try going right before the shop closes to find a good deal... I've realized that since I can't change everything, changing my perspective can really help... it's helped me find little bits of happiness in life!

Before I came to Jinzhou, I once met her training in the mountains. She had journeyed far and wide, sharing tales of the incredible places she'd been. Her views on nature completely changed how I paint. That deep focus she had while training... I aim for that same focus in my own art.

I often run into her when I'm out painting. I'm curious about the habits of plants, and she's really into what they mean in Huanglong culture. So we end up spending a lot of time just squatting by some plant, chatting.

She's got a real knack for appraising antiques, and knows all about where the rare old paintings are kept. If she hadn't told me where to find those friendly collectors, I'd never have gotten to see the originals with my own eyes. Though she's never told me how she gets her info, I can tell it's not easy. So now and then, I slip some money into her pocket when she's not looking!

Oh! She once invited me to dinner, and I said yes. However, when I arrived at the restaurant, it turned out to be a large gathering with dozens of people… I was quite nervous, but she was super nice, always making sure I was okay. Thanks to that, I actually met a lot of new people... and some of them even became my clients later on.

His lion dancing... it's really something. So precise and yet so full of life. I once walked by a lion dance performance and tried to sketch it quickly, but the movements kept changing... My pencil couldn't keep up. So, I ended up going to the theater a few more times just to watch. Before I knew it, I actually started enjoying the lion dances quite a bit.

It's your birthday today. I-I know there will be many people celebrating and giving you gifts, so... I'm not sure what to get that won't be repetitive… How-how about you tell me what you want? Anything you want, I can find it, or any place you wanna go, I'll come along. If you haven't decided yet, that's okay too! My offer will never expire. Really, anytime you need something, just ask and I'll do my best. Oops, sorry, I-I'm rambling... I meant to say, happy birthday!
Hmm… what should I paint… Oh…
I'm Zhezhi… I do commissioned paintings. Um, what else...? Oh, I'm open for commissions! I offer fair prices, can adapt to any style you need, and do revisions too. And I never miss a deadline!
Now I've got the energy to work on my commissions.
Your trust… means so much to me!
Fighting… has never been my strong suit. But, I understand what you're asking of me. I won't give up easily, no matter who or what I'm up against!

Th-thank you! Sorry if I've been a bother... Please make sure to take care of yourself before helping me. I wouldn't know what to do with this power if something happened to you... But please, know how much I cherish y—Er, I mean, know how much I cherish your help!
